app/services/fan_out_on_write_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class FanOutOnWriteService < BaseService
     4	  include Redisable
     5	
     6	  # Push a status into home and mentions feeds
     7	  # @param [Status] status
     8	  # @param [Hash] options
     9	  # @option options [Boolean] update
    10	  # @option options [Array<Integer>] silenced_account_ids
    11	  # @option options [Boolean] skip_notifications
    12	  def call(status, options = {})
    13	    @status    = status
    14	    @account   = status.account
    15	    @options   = options
    16	
    17	    return if @status.proper.account.suspended?
    18	
    19	    check_race_condition!
    20	    warm_payload_cache!
    21	
    22	    fan_out_to_local_recipients!
    23	    fan_out_to_public_recipients! if broadcastable?
    24	    fan_out_to_public_streams! if broadcastable?
    25	  end
    26	
    27	  private
    28	
    29	  def check_race_condition!
    30	    # I don't know why but at some point we had an issue where
    31	    # this service was being executed with status objects
    32	    # that had a null visibility - which should not be possible
    33	    # since the column in the database is not nullable.
    34	    #
    35	    # This check re-queues the service to be run at a later time
    36	    # with the full object, if something like it occurs
    37	
    38	    raise Mastodon::RaceConditionError if @status.visibility.nil?
    39	  end
    40	
    41	  def fan_out_to_local_recipients!
    42	    deliver_to_self!
    43	
    44	    unless @options[:skip_notifications]
    45	      notify_quoted_account!
    46	      notify_mentioned_accounts!
    47	      notify_about_update! if update?
    48	    end
    49	
    50	    case @status.visibility.to_sym
    51	    when :public, :unlisted, :private
    52	      deliver_to_all_followers!
    53	      deliver_to_lists!
    54	    when :limited
    55	      deliver_to_mentioned_followers!
    56	    else
    57	      deliver_to_mentioned_followers!
    58	      deliver_to_conversation!
    59	    end
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  def fan_out_to_public_recipients!
    63	    deliver_to_hashtag_followers!
    64	  end
    65	
    66	  def fan_out_to_public_streams!
    67	    broadcast_to_hashtag_streams!
    68	    broadcast_to_public_streams!
    69	  end
    70	
    71	  def deliver_to_self!
    72	    FeedManager.instance.push_to_home(@account, @status, update: update?) if @account.local?
    73	  end
    74	
    75	  def notify_quoted_account!
    76	    return unless @status.quote&.quoted_account&.local? && @status.quote&.accepted?
    77	
    78	    LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(@status.quote.quoted_account_id, @status.quote.id, 'Quote', 'quote')
    79	  end
    80	
    81	  def notify_mentioned_accounts!
    82	    @status.active_mentions.joins(:account).merge(Account.local).select(:id, :account_id).reorder(nil).find_in_batches do |mentions|
    83	      LocalNotificationWorker.push_bulk(mentions) do |mention|
    84	        options = { 'silenced' => true } if @options[:silenced_account_ids]&.include?(mention.account_id)
    85	
    86	        [mention.account_id, mention.id, 'Mention', 'mention', options].compact
    87	      end
    88	
    89	      next unless update?
    90	
    91	      # This may result in duplicate update payloads, but this ensures clients
    92	      # are aware of edits to posts only appearing in mention notifications
    93	      # (e.g. private mentions or mentions by people they do not follow)
    94	      PushUpdateWorker.push_bulk(mentions.filter { |mention| subscribed_to_streaming_api?(mention.account_id) }) do |mention|
    95	        [mention.account_id, @status.id, "timeline:#{mention.account_id}:notifications", { 'update' => true }]
    96	      end
    97	    end
    98	  end
    99	
   100	  def notify_about_update!
   101	    @status.reblogged_by_accounts.merge(Account.local).select(:id).reorder(nil).find_in_batches do |accounts|
   102	      LocalNotificationWorker.push_bulk(accounts) do |account|
   103	        [account.id, @status.id, 'Status', 'update']
   104	      end
   105	    end
   106	
   107	    @status.quotes.accepted.find_in_batches do |quotes|
   108	      LocalNotificationWorker.push_bulk(quotes) do |quote|
   109	        [quote.account_id, quote.status_id, 'Status', 'quoted_update']
   110	      end
   111	    end
   112	  end
   113	
   114	  def deliver_to_all_followers!
   115	    @account.followers_for_local_distribution.select(:id).reorder(nil).find_in_batches do |followers|
   116	      FeedInsertWorker.push_bulk(followers) do |follower|
   117	        [@status.id, follower.id, 'home', { 'update' => update? }]
   118	      end
   119	    end
   120	  end
   121	
   122	  def deliver_to_hashtag_followers!
   123	    TagFollow.for_local_distribution.where(tag_id: @status.tags.map(&:id)).select(:id, :account_id).reorder(nil).find_in_batches do |follows|
   124	      FeedInsertWorker.push_bulk(follows) do |follow|
   125	        [@status.id, follow.account_id, 'tags', { 'update' => update? }]
   126	      end
   127	    end
   128	  end
   129	
   130	  def deliver_to_lists!
   131	    @account.lists_for_local_distribution.select(:id).reorder(nil).find_in_batches do |lists|
   132	      FeedInsertWorker.push_bulk(lists) do |list|
   133	        [@status.id, list.id, 'list', { 'update' => update? }]
   134	      end
   135	    end
   136	  end
   137	
   138	  def deliver_to_mentioned_followers!
   139	    @status.mentions.joins(:account).merge(@account.followers_for_local_distribution).select(:id, :account_id).reorder(nil).find_in_batches do |mentions|
   140	      FeedInsertWorker.push_bulk(mentions) do |mention|
   141	        [@status.id, mention.account_id, 'home', { 'update' => update? }]
   142	      end
   143	    end
   144	  end
   145	
   146	  def broadcast_to_hashtag_streams!
   147	    @status.tags.map(&:name).each do |hashtag|
   148	      redis.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag.downcase}", anonymous_payload)
   149	      redis.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag.downcase}:local", anonymous_payload) if @status.local?
   150	    end
   151	  end
   152	
   153	  def broadcast_to_public_streams!
   154	    return if @status.reply? && @status.in_reply_to_account_id != @account.id
   155	
   156	    redis.publish('timeline:public', anonymous_payload)
   157	    redis.publish(@status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local' : 'timeline:public:remote', anonymous_payload)
   158	
   159	    if @status.with_media?
   160	      redis.publish('timeline:public:media', anonymous_payload)
   161	      redis.publish(@status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local:media' : 'timeline:public:remote:media', anonymous_payload)
   162	    end
   163	  end
   164	
   165	  def deliver_to_conversation!
   166	    AccountConversation.add_status(@account, @status) unless update?
   167	  end
   168	
   169	  def warm_payload_cache!
   170	    Rails.cache.write("fan-out/#{@status.id}", rendered_status)
   171	  end
   172	
   173	  def anonymous_payload
   174	    @anonymous_payload ||= JSON.generate({
   175	      event: update? ? :'status.update' : :update,
   176	      payload: rendered_status,
   177	    }.as_json)
   178	  end
   179	
   180	  def rendered_status
   181	    @rendered_status ||= InlineRenderer.render(@status, nil, :status)
   182	  end
   183	
   184	  def update?
   185	    @options[:update]
   186	  end
   187	
   188	  def broadcastable?
   189	    @status.public_visibility? && !@status.reblog? && !@account.silenced?
   190	  end
   191	
   192	  def subscribed_to_streaming_api?(account_id)
   193	    redis.exists?("subscribed:timeline:#{account_id}") || redis.exists?("subscribed:timeline:#{account_id}:notifications")
   194	  end
   195	end
app/services/remove_status_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class RemoveStatusService < BaseService
     4	  include Redisable
     5	  include Payloadable
     6	  include Lockable
     7	
     8	  # Delete a status
     9	  # @param   [Status] status
    10	  # @param   [Hash] options
    11	  # @option  [Boolean] :redraft
    12	  # @option  [Boolean] :immediate
    13	  # @option  [Boolean] :preserve
    14	  # @option  [Boolean] :original_removed
    15	  # @option  [Boolean] :skip_streaming
    16	  def call(status, **options)
    17	    @payload  = { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json
    18	    @status   = status
    19	    @account  = status.account
    20	    @options  = options
    21	
    22	    with_redis_lock("distribute:#{@status.id}") do
    23	      @status.discard_with_reblogs
    24	
    25	      StatusPin.find_by(status: @status)&.destroy
    26	
    27	      remove_from_self if @account.local?
    28	      remove_from_followers
    29	      remove_from_lists
    30	
    31	      # There is no reason to send out Undo activities when the
    32	      # cause is that the original object has been removed, since
    33	      # original object being removed implicitly removes reblogs
    34	      # of it. The Delete activity of the original is forwarded
    35	      # separately.
    36	      remove_from_remote_reach if @account.local? && !@options[:original_removed]
    37	
    38	      # Since reblogs don't mention anyone, don't get reblogged,
    39	      # favourited and don't contain their own media attachments
    40	      # or hashtags, this can be skipped
    41	      unless @status.reblog?
    42	        remove_from_mentions
    43	        remove_reblogs
    44	        remove_from_hashtags
    45	        remove_from_public
    46	        remove_from_media if @status.with_media?
    47	        remove_media
    48	      end
    49	
    50	      # Revoke the quote while we get a chance… maybe this should be a `before_destroy` hook?
    51	      RevokeQuoteService.new.call(@status.quote) if @status.quote&.quoted_account&.local? && @status.quote&.accepted?
    52	
    53	      @status.destroy! if permanently?
    54	    end
    55	  end
    56	
    57	  private
    58	
    59	  # The following FeedManager calls all do not result in redis publishes for
    60	  # streaming, as the `:update` option is false
    61	
    62	  def remove_from_self
    63	    FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_home(@account, @status)
    64	  end
    65	
    66	  def remove_from_followers
    67	    @account.followers_for_local_distribution.includes(:user).reorder(nil).find_each do |follower|
    68	      FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_home(follower, @status)
    69	    end
    70	  end
    71	
    72	  def remove_from_lists
    73	    @account.lists_for_local_distribution.select(:id, :account_id).includes(account: :user).reorder(nil).find_each do |list|
    74	      FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_list(list, @status)
    75	    end
    76	  end
    77	
    78	  def remove_from_mentions
    79	    # For limited visibility statuses, the mentions that determine
    80	    # who receives them in their home feed are a subset of followers
    81	    # and therefore the delete is already handled by sending it to all
    82	    # followers. Here we send a delete to actively mentioned accounts
    83	    # that may not follow the account
    84	
    85	    return if skip_streaming?
    86	
    87	    @status.active_mentions.find_each do |mention|
    88	      redis.publish("timeline:#{mention.account_id}", @payload)
    89	    end
    90	  end
    91	
    92	  def remove_from_remote_reach
    93	    # Followers, relays, people who got mentioned in the status,
    94	    # or who reblogged it from someone else might not follow
    95	    # the author and wouldn't normally receive the delete
    96	    # notification - so here, we explicitly send it to them
    97	
    98	    status_reach_finder = StatusReachFinder.new(@status, unsafe: true)
    99	
   100	    ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(status_reach_finder.inboxes, limit: 1_000) do |inbox_url|
   101	      [signed_activity_json, @account.id, inbox_url]
   102	    end
   103	  end
   104	
   105	  def signed_activity_json
   106	    @signed_activity_json ||= serialize_payload(@status, @status.reblog? ? ActivityPub::UndoAnnounceSerializer : ActivityPub::DeleteNoteSerializer, signer: @account, always_sign: true).to_json
   107	  end
   108	
   109	  def remove_reblogs
   110	    # We delete reblogs of the status before the original status,
   111	    # because once original status is gone, reblogs will disappear
   112	    # without us being able to do all the fancy stuff
   113	
   114	    @status.reblogs.rewhere(deleted_at: [nil, @status.deleted_at]).includes(:account).reorder(nil).find_each do |reblog|
   115	      RemoveStatusService.new.call(reblog, original_removed: true, skip_streaming: skip_streaming?)
   116	    end
   117	  end
   118	
   119	  def remove_from_hashtags
   120	    @account.featured_tags.where(tag_id: @status.tags.map(&:id)).find_each do |featured_tag|
   121	      featured_tag.decrement(@status)
   122	    end
   123	
   124	    return unless @status.public_visibility?
   125	
   126	    return if skip_streaming?
   127	
   128	    @status.tags.map(&:name).each do |hashtag|
   129	      redis.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag.downcase}", @payload)
   130	      redis.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag.downcase}:local", @payload) if @status.local?
   131	    end
   132	  end
   133	
   134	  def remove_from_public
   135	    return unless @status.public_visibility?
   136	
   137	    return if skip_streaming?
   138	
   139	    redis.publish('timeline:public', @payload)
   140	    redis.publish(@status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local' : 'timeline:public:remote', @payload)
   141	  end
   142	
   143	  def remove_from_media
   144	    return unless @status.public_visibility?
   145	
   146	    return if skip_streaming?
   147	
   148	    redis.publish('timeline:public:media', @payload)
   149	    redis.publish(@status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local:media' : 'timeline:public:remote:media', @payload)
   150	  end
   151	
   152	  def remove_media
   153	    return if @options[:redraft]
   154	
   155	    if permanently?
   156	      @status.media_attachments.destroy_all
   157	    else
   158	      UpdateMediaAttachmentsPermissionsService.new.call(@status.media_attachments, :private)
   159	    end
   160	  end
   161	
   162	  def permanently?
   163	    @options[:immediate] || !(@options[:preserve] || @status.reported?)
   164	  end
   165	
   166	  def skip_streaming?
   167	    !!@options[:skip_streaming]
   168	  end
   169	end
app/services/batched_remove_status_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class BatchedRemoveStatusService < BaseService
     4	  include Redisable
     5	
     6	  # Delete multiple statuses and reblogs of them as efficiently as possible
     7	  # @param [Enumerable<Status>] statuses An array of statuses
     8	  # @param [Hash] options
     9	  # @option [Boolean] :skip_side_effects Do not modify feeds and send updates to streaming API
    10	  def call(statuses, **options)
    11	    ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(
    12	      records: statuses,
    13	      associations: options[:skip_side_effects] ? :reblogs : [:account, :tags, reblogs: :account]
    14	    ).call
    15	
    16	    statuses_and_reblogs = statuses.flat_map { |status| [status] + status.reblogs }
    17	
    18	    # The conversations for direct visibility statuses also need
    19	    # to be manually updated. This part is not efficient but we
    20	    # rely on direct visibility statuses being relatively rare.
    21	    statuses_with_account_conversations = statuses.select(&:direct_visibility?)
    22	
    23	    ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(
    24	      records: statuses_with_account_conversations,
    25	      associations: [mentions: :account]
    26	    ).call
    27	
    28	    statuses_with_account_conversations.each(&:unlink_from_conversations!)
    29	
    30	    # We do not batch all deletes into one to avoid having a long-running
    31	    # transaction lock the database, but we use the delete method instead
    32	    # of destroy to avoid all callbacks. We rely on foreign keys to
    33	    # cascade the delete faster without loading the associations.
    34	    statuses_and_reblogs.each_slice(50) { |slice| Status.unscoped.where(id: slice.pluck(:id)).delete_all }
    35	
    36	    # Since we skipped all callbacks, we also need to manually
    37	    # deindex the statuses
    38	    if Chewy.enabled?
    39	      Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, statuses_and_reblogs)
    40	      Chewy.strategy.current.update(PublicStatusesIndex, statuses_and_reblogs)
    41	    end
    42	
    43	    return if options[:skip_side_effects]
    44	
    45	    # Batch by source account
    46	    statuses_and_reblogs.group_by(&:account_id).each_value do |account_statuses|
    47	      account = account_statuses.first.account
    48	
    49	      next unless account
    50	
    51	      unpush_from_home_timelines(account, account_statuses)
    52	      unpush_from_list_timelines(account, account_statuses)
    53	    end
    54	
    55	    # Cannot be batched
    56	    @status_id_cutoff = Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(2.weeks.ago)
    57	    redis.pipelined do |pipeline|
    58	      statuses.each do |status|
    59	        unpush_from_public_timelines(status, pipeline)
    60	      end
    61	    end
    62	  end
    63	
    64	  private
    65	
    66	  def unpush_from_home_timelines(account, statuses)
    67	    account.followers_for_local_distribution.includes(:user).reorder(nil).find_each do |follower|
    68	      statuses.each do |status|
    69	        FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_home(follower, status)
    70	      end
    71	    end
    72	  end
    73	
    74	  def unpush_from_list_timelines(account, statuses)
    75	    account.lists_for_local_distribution.select(:id, :account_id).includes(account: :user).reorder(nil).find_each do |list|
    76	      statuses.each do |status|
    77	        FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_list(list, status)
    78	      end
    79	    end
    80	  end
    81	
    82	  def unpush_from_public_timelines(status, pipeline)
    83	    return unless status.public_visibility? && status.id > @status_id_cutoff
    84	
    85	    payload = { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json
    86	
    87	    pipeline.publish('timeline:public', payload)
    88	    pipeline.publish(status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local' : 'timeline:public:remote', payload)
    89	
    90	    if status.media_attachments.any?
    91	      pipeline.publish('timeline:public:media', payload)
    92	      pipeline.publish(status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local:media' : 'timeline:public:remote:media', payload)
    93	    end
    94	
    95	    status.tags.map { |tag| tag.name.downcase }.each do |hashtag|
    96	      pipeline.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag}", payload)
    97	      pipeline.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag}:local", payload) if status.local?
    98	    end
    99	  end
   100	end
app/lib/feed_manager.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	require 'singleton'
     4	
     5	class FeedManager
     6	  include Singleton
     7	  include Redisable
     8	
     9	  # Maximum number of items stored in a single feed
    10	  MAX_ITEMS = 800
    11	
    12	  # Number of items in the feed since last reblog of status
    13	  # before the new reblog will be inserted. Must be <= MAX_ITEMS
    14	  # or the tracking sets will grow forever
    15	  REBLOG_FALLOFF = 40
    16	
    17	  # Execute block for every active account
    18	  # @yield [Account]
    19	  # @return [void]
    20	  def with_active_accounts(&block)
    21	    Account.joins(:user).merge(User.signed_in_recently).find_each(&block)
    22	  end
    23	
    24	  # Redis key of a feed
    25	  # @param [Symbol] type
    26	  # @param [Integer] id
    27	  # @param [Symbol] subtype
    28	  # @return [String]
    29	  def key(type, id, subtype = nil)
    30	    return "feed:#{type}:#{id}" unless subtype
    31	
    32	    "feed:#{type}:#{id}:#{subtype}"
    33	  end
    34	
    35	  # The number of items in the given timeline
    36	  # @param [Symbol] type
    37	  # @param [Integer] id
    38	  # @param [Symbol] subtype
    39	  # @return [Integer]
    40	  def timeline_size(type, id, subtype = nil)
    41	    redis.zcard(key(type, id, subtype))
    42	  end
    43	
    44	  # The filter result of the status to a particular feed
    45	  # @param [Symbol] timeline_type
    46	  # @param [Status] status
    47	  # @param [Account|List] receiver
    48	  # @return [void|Symbol] nil, :filter, or :skip_home
    49	  def filter(timeline_type, status, receiver)
    50	    case timeline_type
    51	    when :home
    52	      filter_from_home(status, receiver.id, build_crutches(receiver.id, [status]), :home)
    53	    when :list
    54	      (filter_from_list?(status, receiver) ? :filter : nil) || filter_from_home(status, receiver.account_id, build_crutches(receiver.account_id, [status], list: receiver), :list)
    55	    when :mentions
    56	      filter_from_mentions?(status, receiver.id) ? :filter : nil
    57	    when :tags
    58	      filter_from_tags?(status, receiver.id, build_crutches(receiver.id, [status])) ? :filter : nil
    59	    end
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  # Check if the status should not be added to a feed
    63	  # @param [Symbol] timeline_type
    64	  # @param [Status] status
    65	  # @param [Account|List] receiver
    66	  # @return [Boolean]
    67	  def filter?(timeline_type, status, receiver)
    68	    !!filter(timeline_type, status, receiver)
    69	  end
    70	
    71	  # Add a status to a home feed and send a streaming API update
    72	  # @param [Account] account
    73	  # @param [Status] status
    74	  # @param [Boolean] update
    75	  # @return [Boolean]
    76	  def push_to_home(account, status, update: false)
    77	    return false unless account.user&.signed_in_recently?
    78	    return false unless add_to_feed(:home, account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
    79	
    80	    trim(:home, account.id)
    81	    PushUpdateWorker.perform_async(account.id, status.id, "timeline:#{account.id}", { 'update' => update }) if push_update_required?("timeline:#{account.id}")
    82	    true
    83	  end
    84	
    85	  # Remove a status from a home feed and send a streaming API update
    86	  # @param [Account] account
    87	  # @param [Status] status
    88	  # @param [Boolean] update
    89	  # @return [Boolean]
    90	  def unpush_from_home(account, status, update: false)
    91	    return false unless remove_from_feed(:home, account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
    92	
    93	    redis.publish("timeline:#{account.id}", { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json) unless update
    94	    true
    95	  end
    96	
    97	  # Add a status to a list feed and send a streaming API update
    98	  # @param [List] list
    99	  # @param [Status] status
   100	  # @param [Boolean] update
   101	  # @return [Boolean]
   102	  def push_to_list(list, status, update: false)
   103	    return false if filter_from_list?(status, list)
   104	    return false unless list.account.user&.signed_in_recently?
   105	    return false unless add_to_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   106	
   107	    trim(:list, list.id)
   108	    PushUpdateWorker.perform_async(list.account_id, status.id, "timeline:list:#{list.id}", { 'update' => update }) if push_update_required?("timeline:list:#{list.id}")
   109	    true
   110	  end
   111	
   112	  # Remove a status from a list feed and send a streaming API update
   113	  # @param [List] list
   114	  # @param [Status] status
   115	  # @param [Boolean] update
   116	  # @return [Boolean]
   117	  def unpush_from_list(list, status, update: false)
   118	    return false unless remove_from_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   119	
   120	    redis.publish("timeline:list:#{list.id}", { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json) unless update
   121	    true
   122	  end
   123	
   124	  # Fill a home feed with an account's statuses
   125	  # @param [Account] from_account
   126	  # @param [Account] into_account
   127	  # @return [void]
   128	  def merge_into_home(from_account, into_account)
   129	    return unless into_account.user&.signed_in_recently?
   130	
   131	    timeline_key = key(:home, into_account.id)
   132	    aggregate    = into_account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?
   133	    query        = from_account.statuses.list_eligible_visibility.includes(reblog: :account).limit(FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4)
   134	
   135	    if redis.zcard(timeline_key) >= FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4
   136	      oldest_home_score = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, 0, with_scores: true).first.last.to_i
   137	      query = query.where('id > ?', oldest_home_score)
   138	    end
   139	
   140	    statuses = query.to_a
   141	    crutches = build_crutches(into_account.id, statuses)
   142	
   143	    statuses.each do |status|
   144	      next if filter_from_home(status, into_account.id, crutches)
   145	
   146	      add_to_feed(:home, into_account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: aggregate)
   147	    end
   148	
   149	    trim(:home, into_account.id)
   150	  end
   151	
   152	  # Fill a list feed with an account's statuses
   153	  # @param [Account] from_account
   154	  # @param [List] list
   155	  # @return [void]
   156	  def merge_into_list(from_account, list)
   157	    return unless list.account.user&.signed_in_recently?
   158	
   159	    timeline_key = key(:list, list.id)
   160	    aggregate    = list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?
   161	    query        = from_account.statuses.list_eligible_visibility.includes(reblog: :account).limit(FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4)
   162	
   163	    if redis.zcard(timeline_key) >= FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4
   164	      oldest_home_score = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, 0, with_scores: true).first.last.to_i
   165	      query = query.where('id > ?', oldest_home_score)
   166	    end
   167	
   168	    statuses = query.to_a
   169	    crutches = build_crutches(list.account_id, statuses, list: list)
   170	
   171	    statuses.each do |status|
   172	      next if filter_from_home(status, list.account_id, crutches, :list)
   173	
   174	      add_to_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: aggregate)
   175	    end
   176	
   177	    trim(:list, list.id)
   178	  end
   179	
   180	  # Remove an account's statuses from a home feed
   181	  # @param [Account] from_account
   182	  # @param [Account] into_account
   183	  # @return [void]
   184	  def unmerge_from_home(from_account, into_account)
   185	    timeline_key        = key(:home, into_account.id)
   186	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   187	
   188	    from_account.statuses.select(:id, :reblog_of_id).where(id: timeline_status_ids).reorder(nil).find_each do |status|
   189	      remove_from_feed(:home, into_account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: into_account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   190	    end
   191	  end
   192	
   193	  # Remove an account's statuses from a list feed
   194	  # @param [Account] from_account
   195	  # @param [List] list
   196	  # @return [void]
   197	  def unmerge_from_list(from_account, list)
   198	    timeline_key        = key(:list, list.id)
   199	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   200	
   201	    from_account.statuses.select(:id, :reblog_of_id).where(id: timeline_status_ids).reorder(nil).find_each do |status|
   202	      remove_from_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   203	    end
   204	  end
   205	
   206	  # Remove a tag's statuses from a home feed
   207	  # @param [Tag] from_tag
   208	  # @param [Account] into_account
   209	  # @return [void]
   210	  def unmerge_tag_from_home(from_tag, into_account)
   211	    timeline_key        = key(:home, into_account.id)
   212	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   213	
   214	    # This is a bit tricky because we need posts tagged with this hashtag that are not
   215	    # also tagged with another followed hashtag or from a followed user
   216	    scope = from_tag.statuses
   217	      .where(id: timeline_status_ids)
   218	      .where.not(account: into_account)
   219	      .where.not(account: into_account.following)
   220	      .tagged_with_none(TagFollow.where(account: into_account).pluck(:tag_id))
   221	
   222	    scope.select(:id, :reblog_of_id).reorder(nil).find_each do |status|
   223	      remove_from_feed(:home, into_account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: into_account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   224	    end
   225	  end
   226	
   227	  # Clear all statuses from or mentioning target_account from a home feed
   228	  # @param [Account] account
   229	  # @param [Account] target_account
   230	  # @return [void]
   231	  def clear_from_home(account, target_account)
   232	    timeline_key        = key(:home, account.id)
   233	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   234	    statuses            = Status.where(id: timeline_status_ids).select(:id, :reblog_of_id, :account_id).to_a
   235	    reblogged_ids       = Status.where(id: statuses.filter_map(&:reblog_of_id), account: target_account).pluck(:id)
   236	    with_mentions_ids   = Mention.active.where(status_id: statuses.flat_map { |s| [s.id, s.reblog_of_id] }.compact, account: target_account).pluck(:status_id)
   237	
   238	    target_statuses = statuses.select do |status|
   239	      status.account_id == target_account.id || reblogged_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id)
   240	    end
   241	
   242	    target_statuses.each do |status|
   243	      unpush_from_home(account, status)
   244	    end
   245	  end
   246	
   247	  # Clear all statuses from or mentioning target_account from a list feed
   248	  # @param [List] list
   249	  # @param [Account] target_account
   250	  # @return [void]
   251	  def clear_from_list(list, target_account)
   252	    timeline_key        = key(:list, list.id)
   253	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   254	    statuses            = Status.where(id: timeline_status_ids).select(:id, :reblog_of_id, :account_id).to_a
   255	    reblogged_ids       = Status.where(id: statuses.filter_map(&:reblog_of_id), account: target_account).pluck(:id)
   256	    with_mentions_ids   = Mention.active.where(status_id: statuses.flat_map { |s| [s.id, s.reblog_of_id] }.compact, account: target_account).pluck(:status_id)
   257	
   258	    target_statuses = statuses.select do |status|
   259	      status.account_id == target_account.id || reblogged_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id)
   260	    end

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class StatusFilter
     4	  attr_reader :status, :account
     5	
     6	  def initialize(status, account)
     7	    @status              = status
     8	    @account             = account
     9	  end
    10	
    11	  def filtered?
    12	    return false if !account.nil? && account.id == status.account_id
    13	
    14	    blocked_by_policy? || (account_present? && filtered_status?) || silenced_account?
    15	  end
    16	
    17	  def filter_state_for_quote
    18	    if !account.nil? && account.id == status.account_id
    19	      nil
    20	    elsif blocked_by_policy?
    21	      'unauthorized'
    22	    elsif account_present? && blocking_domain?
    23	      'blocked_domain'
    24	    elsif account_present? && blocking_account?
    25	      'blocked_account'
    26	    elsif account_present? && muting_account?
    27	      'muted_account'
    28	    end
    29	  end
    30	
    31	  private
    32	
    33	  def account_present?
    34	    !account.nil?
    35	  end
    36	
    37	  def filtered_status?
    38	    blocking_account? || blocking_domain? || muting_account?
    39	  end
    40	
    41	  def blocking_account?
    42	    account.blocking?(status.account_id)
    43	  end
    44	
    45	  def blocking_domain?
    46	    account.domain_blocking?(status.account_domain)
    47	  end
    48	
    49	  def muting_account?
    50	    account.muting?(status.account_id)
    51	  end
    52	
    53	  def silenced_account?
    54	    status_account_silenced? && !account_following_status_account?
    55	  end
    56	
    57	  def status_account_silenced?
    58	    status.account.silenced?
    59	  end
    60	
    61	  def account_following_status_account?
    62	    account&.following?(status.account_id)
    63	  end
    64	
    65	  def blocked_by_policy?
    66	    !policy_allows_show?
    67	  end
    68	
    69	  def policy_allows_show?
    70	    StatusPolicy.new(account, status).show?
    71	  end
    72	end
app/policies/status_policy.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class StatusPolicy < ApplicationPolicy
     4	  def show?
     5	    return false if author.unavailable?
     6	
     7	    if requires_mention?
     8	      owned? || mention_exists?
     9	    elsif private?
    10	      owned? || following_author? || mention_exists?
    11	    else
    12	      current_account.nil? || (!author_blocking? && !author_blocking_domain?)
    13	    end
    14	  end
    15	
    16	  def quote?
    17	    show? && !blocking_author? && record.quote_policy_for_account(current_account) != :denied
    18	  end
    19	
    20	  def reblog?
    21	    !requires_mention? && (!private? || owned?) && show? && !blocking_author?
    22	  end
    23	
    24	  def favourite?
    25	    show? && !blocking_author?
    26	  end
    27	
    28	  def destroy?
    29	    owned?
    30	  end
    31	
    32	  alias unreblog? destroy?
    33	
    34	  def update?
    35	    owned?
    36	  end
    37	
    38	  private
    39	
    40	  def requires_mention?
    41	    record.direct_visibility? || record.limited_visibility?
    42	  end
    43	
    44	  def owned?
    45	    author.id == current_account&.id
    46	  end
    47	
    48	  def private?
    49	    record.private_visibility?
    50	  end
    51	
    52	  def mention_exists?
    53	    return false if current_account.nil?
    54	
    55	    if record.mentions.loaded?
    56	      record.mentions.any? { |mention| mention.account_id == current_account.id }
    57	    else
    58	      record.mentions.exists?(account: current_account)
    59	    end
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  def author_blocking_domain?
    63	    return false if current_account.nil? || current_account.domain.nil?
    64	
    65	    author.domain_blocking?(current_account.domain)
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  def blocking_author?
    69	    return false if current_account.nil?
    70	
    71	    current_account.blocking?(author)
    72	  end
    73	
    74	  def author_blocking?
    75	    return false if current_account.nil?
    76	
    77	    current_account.blocked_by?(author)
    78	  end
    79	
    80	  def following_author?
    81	    return false if current_account.nil?
    82	
    83	    current_account.following?(author)
    84	  end
    85	
    86	  def author
    87	    record.account
    88	  end
    89	end
app/lib/status_reach_finder.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class StatusReachFinder
     4	  # @param [Status] status
     5	  # @param [Hash] options
     6	  # @option options [Boolean] :unsafe
     7	  def initialize(status, options = {})
     8	    @status  = status
     9	    @options = options
    10	  end
    11	
    12	  def inboxes
    13	    (reached_account_inboxes + followers_inboxes + relay_inboxes).uniq
    14	  end
    15	
    16	  private
    17	
    18	  def reached_account_inboxes
    19	    scope = Account.where(id: reached_account_ids)
    20	    inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
    21	  end
    22	
    23	  def reached_account_ids
    24	    # When the status is a reblog, there are no interactions with it
    25	    # directly, we assume all interactions are with the original one
    26	
    27	    if @status.reblog?
    28	      [reblog_of_account_id]
    29	    else
    30	      [
    31	        replied_to_account_id,
    32	        reblog_of_account_id,
    33	        quote_of_account_id,
    34	        mentioned_account_ids,
    35	        reblogs_account_ids,
    36	        quotes_account_ids,
    37	        favourites_account_ids,
    38	        replies_account_ids,
    39	      ].tap do |arr|
    40	        arr.flatten!
    41	        arr.compact!
    42	        arr.uniq!
    43	      end
    44	    end
    45	  end
    46	
    47	  def replied_to_account_id
    48	    @status.in_reply_to_account_id if distributable?
    49	  end
    50	
    51	  def quote_of_account_id
    52	    @status.quote&.quoted_account_id
    53	  end
    54	
    55	  def reblog_of_account_id
    56	    @status.reblog.account_id if @status.reblog?
    57	  end
    58	
    59	  def mentioned_account_ids
    60	    @status.mentions.pluck(:account_id)
    61	  end
    62	
    63	  # Beware: Quotes can be created without the author having had access to the status
    64	  def quotes_account_ids
    65	    @status.quotes.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  # Beware: Reblogs can be created without the author having had access to the status
    69	  def reblogs_account_ids
    70	    @status.reblogs.rewhere(deleted_at: [nil, @status.deleted_at]).pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    71	  end
    72	
    73	  # Beware: Favourites can be created without the author having had access to the status
    74	  def favourites_account_ids
    75	    @status.favourites.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    76	  end
    77	
    78	  # Beware: Replies can be created without the author having had access to the status
    79	  def replies_account_ids
    80	    @status.replies.pluck(:account_id) if distributable? || unsafe?
    81	  end
    82	
    83	  def followers_inboxes
    84	    scope = followers_scope
    85	    inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
    86	  end
    87	
    88	  def relay_inboxes
    89	    if @status.public_visibility?
    90	      Relay.enabled.pluck(:inbox_url)
    91	    else
    92	      []
    93	    end
    94	  end
    95	
    96	  def distributable?
    97	    @status.public_visibility? || @status.unlisted_visibility?
    98	  end
    99	
   100	  def unsafe?
   101	    @options[:unsafe]
   102	  end
   103	
   104	  def followers_scope
   105	    if @status.in_reply_to_local_account? && distributable?
   106	      @status.account.followers.or(@status.thread.account.followers.not_domain_blocked_by_account(@status.account))
   107	    elsif @status.direct_visibility? || @status.limited_visibility?
   108	      Account.none
   109	    else
   110	      @status.account.followers
   111	    end
   112	  end
   113	
   114	  def inboxes_without_suspended_for(scope)
   115	    scope.merge!(Account.without_suspended) unless unsafe?
   116	    scope.inboxes
   117	  end
   118	end

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	# == Schema Information
     4	#
     5	# Table name: account_statuses_cleanup_policies
     6	#
     7	#  id                 :bigint(8)        not null, primary key
     8	#  enabled            :boolean          default(TRUE), not null
     9	#  keep_direct        :boolean          default(TRUE), not null
    10	#  keep_media         :boolean          default(FALSE), not null
    11	#  keep_pinned        :boolean          default(TRUE), not null
    12	#  keep_polls         :boolean          default(FALSE), not null
    13	#  keep_self_bookmark :boolean          default(TRUE), not null
    14	#  keep_self_fav      :boolean          default(TRUE), not null
    15	#  min_favs           :integer
    16	#  min_reblogs        :integer
    17	#  min_status_age     :integer          default(1209600), not null
    18	#  created_at         :datetime         not null
    19	#  updated_at         :datetime         not null
    20	#  account_id         :bigint(8)        not null
    21	#
    22	class AccountStatusesCleanupPolicy < ApplicationRecord
    23	  include Redisable
    24	
    25	  ALLOWED_MIN_STATUS_AGE = [
    26	    1.week.seconds,
    27	    2.weeks.seconds,
    28	    1.month.seconds,
    29	    2.months.seconds,
    30	    3.months.seconds,
    31	    6.months.seconds,
    32	    1.year.seconds,
    33	    2.years.seconds,
    34	  ].freeze
    35	
    36	  EXCEPTION_BOOLS      = %w(keep_direct keep_pinned keep_polls keep_media keep_self_fav keep_self_bookmark).freeze
    37	  EXCEPTION_THRESHOLDS = %w(min_favs min_reblogs).freeze
    38	
    39	  # Depending on the cleanup policy, the query to discover the next
    40	  # statuses to delete my get expensive if the account has a lot of old
    41	  # statuses otherwise excluded from deletion by the other exceptions.
    42	  #
    43	  # Therefore, `EARLY_SEARCH_CUTOFF` is meant to be the maximum number of
    44	  # old statuses to be considered for deletion prior to checking exceptions.
    45	  #
    46	  # This is used in `compute_cutoff_id` to provide a `max_id` to
    47	  # `statuses_to_delete`.
    48	  EARLY_SEARCH_CUTOFF = 5_000
    49	
    50	  belongs_to :account
    51	
    52	  validates :min_status_age, inclusion: { in: ALLOWED_MIN_STATUS_AGE }
    53	  validates :min_favs, numericality: { greater_than_or_equal_to: 1, allow_nil: true }
    54	  validates :min_reblogs, numericality: { greater_than_or_equal_to: 1, allow_nil: true }
    55	  validate :validate_local_account
    56	
    57	  before_save :update_last_inspected
    58	
    59	  def statuses_to_delete(limit = 50, max_id = nil, min_id = nil)
    60	    scope = account_statuses
    61	    scope.merge!(old_enough_scope(max_id))
    62	    scope = scope.where(id: min_id..) if min_id.present?
    63	    scope.merge!(without_popular_scope) unless min_favs.nil? && min_reblogs.nil?
    64	    scope.merge!(without_direct_scope) if keep_direct?
    65	    scope.merge!(without_pinned_scope) if keep_pinned?
    66	    scope.merge!(without_poll_scope) if keep_polls?
    67	    scope.merge!(without_media_scope) if keep_media?
    68	    scope.merge!(without_self_fav_scope) if keep_self_fav?
    69	    scope.merge!(without_self_bookmark_scope) if keep_self_bookmark?
    70	
    71	    scope.reorder(id: :asc).limit(limit)
    72	  end
    73	
    74	  # This computes a toot id such that:
    75	  # - the toot would be old enough to be candidate for deletion
    76	  # - there are at most EARLY_SEARCH_CUTOFF toots between the last inspected toot and this one
    77	  #
    78	  # The idea is to limit expensive SQL queries when an account has lots of toots excluded from
    79	  # deletion, while not starting anew on each run.
    80	  def compute_cutoff_id
    81	    min_id = last_inspected || 0
    82	    max_id = Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(min_status_age.seconds.ago, with_random: false)
    83	    subquery = account_statuses.where(id: min_id..max_id)
    84	    subquery = subquery.select(:id).reorder(id: :asc).limit(EARLY_SEARCH_CUTOFF)
    85	
    86	    # We're textually interpolating a subquery here as ActiveRecord seem to not provide
    87	    # a way to apply the limit to the subquery
    88	    Status.connection.execute("SELECT MAX(id) FROM (#{subquery.to_sql}) t").values.first.first
    89	  end
    90	
    91	  # The most important thing about `last_inspected` is that any toot older than it is guaranteed
    92	  # not to be kept by the policy regardless of its age.
    93	  def record_last_inspected(last_id)
    94	    redis.set("account_cleanup:#{account_id}", last_id, ex: 2.weeks.seconds)
    95	  end
    96	
    97	  def last_inspected
    98	    redis.get("account_cleanup:#{account_id}")&.to_i
    99	  end
   100	
   101	  def invalidate_last_inspected(status, action)
   102	    last_value = last_inspected
   103	    return if last_value.nil? || status.id > last_value || status.account_id != account_id
   104	
   105	    case action
   106	    when :unbookmark
   107	      return unless keep_self_bookmark?
   108	    when :unfav
   109	      return unless keep_self_fav?
   110	    when :unpin
   111	      return unless keep_pinned?
   112	    end
   113	
   114	    record_last_inspected(status.id)
   115	  end
   116	
   117	  private
   118	
   119	  def update_last_inspected
   120	    if EXCEPTION_BOOLS.filter_map { |name| attribute_change_to_be_saved(name) }.include?([true, false])
   121	      # Policy has been widened in such a way that any previously-inspected status
   122	      # may need to be deleted, so we'll have to start again.
   123	      redis.del("account_cleanup:#{account_id}")
   124	    end
   125	    redis.del("account_cleanup:#{account_id}") if EXCEPTION_THRESHOLDS.filter_map { |name| attribute_change_to_be_saved(name) }.any? { |old, new| old.present? && (new.nil? || new > old) }
   126	  end
   127	
   128	  def validate_local_account
   129	    errors.add(:account, :invalid) unless account&.local?
   130	  end
   131	
   132	  def without_direct_scope
   133	    Status.not_direct_visibility
   134	  end
   135	
   136	  def old_enough_scope(max_id = nil)
   137	    # Filtering on `id` rather than `min_status_age` ago will treat
   138	    # non-snowflake statuses as older than they really are, but Mastodon
   139	    # has switched to snowflake IDs significantly over 2 years ago anyway.
   140	    snowflake_id = Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(min_status_age.seconds.ago, with_random: false)
   141	
   142	    max_id = snowflake_id if max_id.nil? || snowflake_id < max_id
   143	
   144	    Status.where(id: ..max_id)
   145	  end
   146	
   147	  def without_self_fav_scope
   148	    Status.where.not(self_status_reference_exists(Favourite))
   149	  end
   150	
   151	  def without_self_bookmark_scope
   152	    Status.where.not(self_status_reference_exists(Bookmark))
   153	  end
   154	
   155	  def without_pinned_scope
   156	    Status.where.not(self_status_reference_exists(StatusPin))
   157	  end
   158	
   159	  def without_media_scope
   160	    Status.where.not(status_media_reference_exists)
   161	  end
   162	
   163	  def without_poll_scope
   164	    Status.without_polls
   165	  end
   166	
   167	  def without_popular_scope
   168	    scope = Status.left_joins(:status_stat)
   169	    scope = scope.where('COALESCE(status_stats.reblogs_count, 0) < ?', min_reblogs) unless min_reblogs.nil?
   170	    scope = scope.where('COALESCE(status_stats.favourites_count, 0) < ?', min_favs) unless min_favs.nil?
   171	    scope
   172	  end
   173	
   174	  def account_statuses
   175	    Status.where(account_id: account_id)
   176	  end
   177	
   178	  def status_media_reference_exists
   179	    MediaAttachment
   180	      .where(MediaAttachment.arel_table[:status_id].eq Status.arel_table[:id])
   181	      .select(1)
   182	      .arel
   183	      .exists
   184	  end
   185	
   186	  def self_status_reference_exists(model)
   187	    model
   188	      .where(model.arel_table[:account_id].eq Status.arel_table[:account_id])
   189	      .where(model.arel_table[:status_id].eq Status.arel_table[:id])
   190	      .select(1)
   191	      .arel
   192	      .exists
   193	  end
   194	end
app/services/account_statuses_cleanup_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class AccountStatusesCleanupService < BaseService
     4	  # @param [AccountStatusesCleanupPolicy] account_policy
     5	  # @param [Integer] budget
     6	  # @return [Integer]
     7	  def call(account_policy, budget = 50)
     8	    return 0 unless account_policy.enabled?
     9	
    10	    cutoff_id = account_policy.compute_cutoff_id
    11	    return 0 if cutoff_id.blank?
    12	
    13	    num_deleted = 0
    14	    last_deleted = nil
    15	
    16	    account_policy.statuses_to_delete(budget, cutoff_id, account_policy.last_inspected).reorder(nil).find_each(order: :asc) do |status|
    17	      status.discard_with_reblogs
    18	      RemovalWorker.perform_async(status.id, { 'redraft' => false })
    19	      num_deleted += 1
    20	      last_deleted = status.id
    21	    end
    22	
    23	    account_policy.record_last_inspected(last_deleted.presence || cutoff_id)
    24	
    25	    num_deleted
    26	  end
    27	end

     3	class Api::BaseController < ApplicationController
     4	  DEFAULT_STATUSES_LIMIT = 20

     7	  include Api::RateLimitHeaders
     8	  include Api::AccessTokenTrackingConcern

    10	  include Api::ContentSecurityPolicy
    11	  include Api::ErrorHandling

    13	
    14	  skip_before_action :require_functional!, unless: :limited_federation_mode?
    15	
    16	  before_action :require_authenticated_user!, if: :disallow_unauthenticated_api_access?
    17	  before_action :require_not_suspended!
    18	
    19	  vary_by 'Authorization'
    20	
    21	  protect_from_forgery with: :null_session
    22	
    23	  def doorkeeper_unauthorized_render_options(error: nil)
    24	    { json: { error: error.try(:description) || 'Not authorized' } }
    25	  end
    26	
    27	  def doorkeeper_forbidden_render_options(*)

    30	
    31	  protected
    32	
    33	  def limit_param(default_limit, max_limit = nil)
    34	    return default_limit unless params[:limit]

    36	    [params[:limit].to_i.abs, max_limit || (default_limit * 2)].min
    37	  end
    38	
    39	  def params_slice(*keys)
    40	    params.slice(*keys).permit(*keys)
    41	  end
    42	
    43	  def current_resource_owner
    44	    @current_user ||= User.find(doorkeeper_token.resource_owner_id) if doorkeeper_token
    45	  end
    46	
    47	  def current_user
    48	    current_resource_owner || super
    49	  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
    50	    nil
    51	  end
    52	
    53	  def require_client_credentials!
    54	    render json: { error: 'This method requires an client credentials authentication' }, status: 403 if doorkeeper_token.resource_owner_id.present?
    55	  end
    56	
    57	  def require_authenticated_user!
    58	    render json: { error: 'This method requires an authenticated user' }, status: 401 unless current_user
    59	  end
    60	
    61	  def require_not_suspended!
    62	    render json: { error: 'Your login is currently disabled' }, status: 403 if current_user&.account&.unavailable?
    63	  end
    64	
    65	  def require_user!
    66	    if !current_user
    67	      render json: { error: 'This method requires an authenticated user' }, status: 422
    68	    elsif !current_user.confirmed?
    69	      render json: { error: 'Your login is missing a confirmed e-mail address' }, status: 403
    70	    elsif !current_user.approved?
    71	      render json: { error: 'Your login is currently pending approval' }, status: 403
    72	    elsif !current_user.functional?
    73	      render json: { error: 'Your login is currently disabled' }, status: 403
    74	    else
    75	      update_user_sign_in
    76	    end
    77	  end
    78	
    79	  # Redefine `require_functional!` to properly output JSON instead of HTML redirects
    80	  def require_functional!
    81	    return if current_user.functional?
    82	
    83	    require_user!
    84	  end
    85	
    86	  def render_empty
    87	    render json: {}, status: 200
    88	  end
    89	
    90	  def authorize_if_got_token!(*scopes)
    91	    doorkeeper_authorize!(*scopes) if doorkeeper_token
    92	  end
    93	
    94	  def disallow_unauthenticated_api_access?
    95	    ENV['DISALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED_API_ACCESS'] == 'true' || Rails.configuration.x.mastodon.limited_federation_mode
    96	  end
    97	
    98	  private
    99	
   100	  def respond_with_error(code)
   101	    render json: { error: Rack::Utils::HTTP_STATUS_CODES[code] }, status: code
   102	  end
   103	
   104	  def alpha_path?
   105	    request.path.starts_with?('/api/v1_alpha')
   106	  end
   107	end

     3	class Api::V1::StatusesController < Api::BaseController
     4	  include Authorization
     5	  include Api::InteractionPoliciesConcern
     6	
     7	  before_action -> { authorize_if_got_token! :read, :'read:statuses' }, except: [:create, :update, :destroy]
     8	  before_action -> { doorkeeper_authorize! :write, :'write:statuses' }, only:   [:create, :update, :destroy]
     9	  before_action :require_user!, except:      [:index, :show]
    10	  before_action :set_statuses, only:         [:index]
    11	  before_action :set_status, only:           [:show]
    12	  before_action :set_thread, only:           [:create]
    13	  before_action :set_quoted_status, only:    [:create]
    14	  before_action :check_statuses_limit, only: [:index]
    15	
    16	  override_rate_limit_headers :create, family: :statuses
    17	  override_rate_limit_headers :update, family: :statuses
    18	
    19	  def index
    20	    @statuses = preload_collection(@statuses, Status)
    21	    render json: @statuses, each_serializer: REST::StatusSerializer
    22	  end
    23	
    24	  def show
    25	    cache_if_unauthenticated!
    26	    @status = preload_collection([@status], Status).first
    27	    render json: @status, serializer: REST::StatusSerializer
    28	  end
    29	
    30	  def create
    31	    @status = PostStatusService.new.call(
    32	      current_user.account,
    33	      text: status_params[:status],
    34	      thread: @thread,
    35	      quoted_status: @quoted_status,
    36	      quote_approval_policy: quote_approval_policy,
    37	      media_ids: status_params[:media_ids],
    38	      sensitive: status_params[:sensitive],
    39	      spoiler_text: status_params[:spoiler_text],
    40	      visibility: status_params[:visibility],
    41	      language: status_params[:language],
    42	      scheduled_at: status_params[:scheduled_at],
    43	      application: doorkeeper_token.application,
    44	      poll: status_params[:poll],
    45	      allowed_mentions: status_params[:allowed_mentions],
    46	      idempotency: request.headers['Idempotency-Key'],
    47	      with_rate_limit: true
    48	    )
    49	
    50	    render json: @status, serializer: serializer_for_status
    51	  rescue PostStatusService::UnexpectedMentionsError => e
    52	    render json: unexpected_accounts_error_json(e), status: 422
    53	  end
    54	
    55	  def update
    56	    @status = Status.where(account: current_account).find(params[:id])
    57	    authorize @status, :update?
    58	
    59	    update_options = {
    60	      text: status_params[:status],
    61	      media_ids: status_params[:media_ids],
    62	      media_attributes: status_params[:media_attributes],
    63	      sensitive: status_params[:sensitive],
    64	      language: status_params[:language],
    65	      spoiler_text: status_params[:spoiler_text],
    66	      poll: status_params[:poll],
    67	    }
    68	
    69	    update_options[:quote_approval_policy] = quote_approval_policy if status_params[:quote_approval_policy].present?
    70	
    71	    UpdateStatusService.new.call(@status, current_account.id, update_options)
    72	
    73	    render json: @status, serializer: REST::StatusSerializer
    74	  end
    75	
    76	  def destroy
    77	    @status = Status.where(account: current_account).find(params[:id])
    78	    authorize @status, :destroy?
    79	
    80	    # JSON is generated before `discard_with_reblogs` in order to have the proper URL
    81	    # for media attachments, as it would otherwise redirect to the media proxy
    82	    json = render_to_body json: @status, serializer: REST::StatusSerializer, source_requested: true
    83	
    84	    @status.discard_with_reblogs
    85	    StatusPin.find_by(status: @status)&.destroy
    86	    @status.account.statuses_count = @status.account.statuses_count - 1
    87	
    88	    RemovalWorker.perform_async(@status.id, { 'redraft' => !truthy_param?(:delete_media) })
    89	
    90	    render json: json
    91	  end
    92	
    93	  private
    94	
    95	  def set_statuses
    96	    @statuses = Status.permitted_statuses_from_ids(status_ids, current_account)
    97	  end
    98	
    99	  def set_status
   100	    @status = Status.find(params[:id])
   101	    authorize @status, :show?
   102	  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound, Mastodon::NotPermittedError
   103	    not_found
   104	  end
   105	
   106	  def set_thread
   107	    @thread = Status.find(status_params[:in_reply_to_id]) if status_params[:in_reply_to_id].present?
   108	    authorize(@thread, :show?) if @thread.present?
   109	  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound, Mastodon::NotPermittedError
   110	    render json: { error: I18n.t('statuses.errors.in_reply_not_found') }, status: 404
   111	  end
   112	
   113	  def set_quoted_status
   114	    @quoted_status = Status.find(status_params[:quoted_status_id])&.proper if status_params[:quoted_status_id].present?
   115	    authorize(@quoted_status, :quote?) if @quoted_status.present?
   116	  rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound, Mastodon::NotPermittedError
   117	    # TODO: distinguish between non-existing and non-quotable posts
   118	    render json: { error: I18n.t('statuses.errors.quoted_status_not_found') }, status: 404
   119	  end
   120	
   121	  def check_statuses_limit
   122	    raise(Mastodon::ValidationError) if status_ids.size > DEFAULT_STATUSES_LIMIT
   123	  end
   124	
   125	  def status_ids
   126	    Array(statuses_params[:id]).uniq.map(&:to_i)
   127	  end
   128	
   129	  def statuses_params
   130	    params.permit(id: [])
   131	  end
   132	
   133	  def status_params
   134	    params.permit(
   135	      :status,
   136	      :in_reply_to_id,
   137	      :quoted_status_id,
   138	      :quote_approval_policy,
   139	      :sensitive,
   140	      :spoiler_text,
   141	      :visibility,
   142	      :language,
   143	      :scheduled_at,
   144	      allowed_mentions: [],
   145	      media_ids: [],
   146	      media_attributes: [
   147	        :id,
   148	        :thumbnail,
   149	        :description,
   150	        :focus,
   151	      ],
   152	      poll: [
   153	        :multiple,
   154	        :hide_totals,
   155	        :expires_in,
   156	        options: [],
   157	      ]
   158	    )
   159	  end
   160	
   161	  def serializer_for_status
   162	    @status.is_a?(ScheduledStatus) ? REST::ScheduledStatusSerializer : REST::StatusSerializer
   163	  end
   164	
   165	  def unexpected_accounts_error_json(error)
   166	    {
   167	      error: error.message,
   168	      unexpected_accounts: serialized_accounts(error.accounts),
   169	    }
   170	  end
   171	
   172	  def serialized_accounts(accounts)
   173	    ActiveModel::Serializer::CollectionSerializer.new(accounts, serializer: REST::AccountSerializer, scope_name: :current_user, scope: current_user)
   174	  end
   175	end

     3	class StatusesController < ApplicationController
     4	  include WebAppControllerConcern

    10

    12	  before_action :set_status
    13	  before_action :redirect_to_original, only: :show
    14	  before_action :verify_embed_allowed, only: :embed
    15	
    16	  after_action :set_link_headers
    17	
    18	  skip_around_action :set_locale, if: -> { request.format == :json }

    25	  def show

    29	
    30	        redirect_to short_account_status_path(@account, @status) if account_id_param.present? && username_param.blank?
    31	      end
    32	
    33	      format.json do

    35	        render_with_cache json: @status, content_type: 'application/activity+json', serializer: ActivityPub::NoteSerializer, adapter: ActivityPub::Adapter
    36	      end
    37	    end
    38	  end

    41	    expires_in 3.minutes, public: @status.distributable? && public_fetch_mode?
    42	    render_with_cache json: @status, content_type: 'application/activity+json', serializer: activity_serializer, adapter: ActivityPub::Adapter
    43	  end
    44	
    45	  def embed
    46	    expires_in 180, public: true
    47	    response.headers.delete('X-Frame-Options')
    48	
    49	    render layout: 'embedded'
    50	  end

    55	    not_found if @status.hidden? || @status.reblog?
    56	  end
    57	
    58	  def set_link_headers
    59	    response.headers['Link'] = LinkHeader.new(
    60	      [[ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(@status), [%w(rel alternate), %w(type application/activity+json)]]]
    61	    ).to_s
    62	  end
    63	
    64	  def set_status

app/lib/account_statuses_filter.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class AccountStatusesFilter
     4	  KEYS = %i(
     5	    pinned
     6	    tagged
     7	    only_media
     8	    exclude_replies
     9	    exclude_reblogs
    10	  ).freeze
    11	
    12	  attr_reader :params, :account, :current_account
    13	
    14	  def initialize(account, current_account, params = {})
    15	    @account         = account
    16	    @current_account = current_account
    17	    @params          = params
    18	  end
    19	
    20	  def results
    21	    scope = initial_scope
    22	
    23	    scope.merge!(pinned_scope)     if pinned?
    24	    scope.merge!(only_media_scope) if only_media?
    25	    scope.merge!(no_replies_scope) if exclude_replies?
    26	    scope.merge!(no_reblogs_scope) if exclude_reblogs?
    27	    scope.merge!(hashtag_scope)    if tagged?
    28	
    29	    scope
    30	  end
    31	
    32	  private
    33	
    34	  def initial_scope
    35	    return Status.none if account.unavailable?
    36	
    37	    if anonymous?
    38	      account.statuses.distributable_visibility
    39	    elsif author?
    40	      exclude_direct? ? account.statuses.where(visibility: %i(public unlisted private)) : account.statuses.all # NOTE: #merge! does not work without the #all
    41	    elsif blocked?
    42	      Status.none
    43	    else
    44	      filtered_scope
    45	    end
    46	  end
    47	
    48	  def filtered_scope
    49	    scope = account.statuses
    50	
    51	    if exclude_direct?
    52	      scope = scope.where(visibility: follower? ? %i(public unlisted private) : %i(public unlisted))
    53	    else
    54	      scope = account.statuses.left_outer_joins(:mentions)
    55	      scope.merge!(scope.where(visibility: follower? ? %i(public unlisted private) : %i(public unlisted)).or(scope.where(mentions: { account_id: current_account.id })).group(Status.arel_table[:id]))
    56	    end
    57	
    58	    scope.merge!(filtered_reblogs_scope) if reblogs_may_occur?
    59	
    60	    scope
    61	  end
    62	
    63	  def filtered_reblogs_scope
    64	    scope = Status.left_outer_joins(reblog: :account)
    65	    scope
    66	      .where(reblog_of_id: nil)
    67	      .or(
    68	        scope
    69	          # This is basically `Status.not_domain_blocked_by_account(current_account)`
    70	          # and `Status.not_excluded_by_account(current_account)` but on the
    71	          # `reblog` association. Unfortunately, there seem to be no clean way
    72	          # to re-use those scopes in our case.
    73	          .where(reblog: { accounts: { domain: nil } }).or(scope.where.not(reblog: { accounts: { domain: current_account.excluded_from_timeline_domains } }))
    74	          .where.not(reblog: { account_id: current_account.excluded_from_timeline_account_ids })
    75	      )
    76	  end
    77	
    78	  def only_media_scope
    79	    Status.without_empty_attachments.joins(:media_attachments).merge(account.media_attachments).group(Status.arel_table[:id])
    80	  end
    81	
    82	  def no_replies_scope
    83	    Status.without_replies
    84	  end
    85	
    86	  def no_reblogs_scope
    87	    Status.without_reblogs
    88	  end
    89	
    90	  def pinned_scope
    91	    account.pinned_statuses.group(Status.arel_table[:id], StatusPin.arel_table[:created_at])
    92	  end
    93	
    94	  def hashtag_scope
    95	    tag = Tag.find_normalized(params[:tagged])
    96	
    97	    if tag
    98	      Status.tagged_with(tag.id)
    99	    else
   100	      Status.none
   101	    end
   102	  end
   103	
   104	  def anonymous?
   105	    current_account.nil?
   106	  end
   107	
   108	  def author?
   109	    current_account.id == account.id
   110	  end
   111	
   112	  def blocked?
   113	    account.blocking?(current_account) || (current_account.domain.present? && account.domain_blocking?(current_account.domain))
   114	  end
   115	
   116	  def follower?
   117	    current_account.following?(account)
   118	  end
   119	
   120	  def reblogs_may_occur?
   121	    !exclude_reblogs? && !only_media? && !tagged?
   122	  end
   123	
   124	  def pinned?
   125	    truthy_param?(:pinned)
   126	  end
   127	
   128	  def only_media?
   129	    truthy_param?(:only_media)
   130	  end
   131	
   132	  def exclude_direct?
   133	    truthy_param?(:exclude_direct)
   134	  end
   135	
   136	  def exclude_replies?
   137	    truthy_param?(:exclude_replies)
   138	  end
   139	
   140	  def exclude_reblogs?
   141	    truthy_param?(:exclude_reblogs)
   142	  end
   143	
   144	  def tagged?
   145	    params[:tagged].present?
   146	  end
   147	
   148	  def truthy_param?(key)
   149	    ActiveModel::Type::Boolean.new.cast(params[key])
   150	  end
   151	end
app/lib/feed_manager.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	require 'singleton'
     4	
     5	class FeedManager
     6	  include Singleton
     7	  include Redisable
     8	
     9	  # Maximum number of items stored in a single feed
    10	  MAX_ITEMS = 800
    11	
    12	  # Number of items in the feed since last reblog of status
    13	  # before the new reblog will be inserted. Must be <= MAX_ITEMS
    14	  # or the tracking sets will grow forever
    15	  REBLOG_FALLOFF = 40
    16	
    17	  # Execute block for every active account
    18	  # @yield [Account]
    19	  # @return [void]
    20	  def with_active_accounts(&block)
    21	    Account.joins(:user).merge(User.signed_in_recently).find_each(&block)
    22	  end
    23	
    24	  # Redis key of a feed
    25	  # @param [Symbol] type
    26	  # @param [Integer] id
    27	  # @param [Symbol] subtype
    28	  # @return [String]
    29	  def key(type, id, subtype = nil)
    30	    return "feed:#{type}:#{id}" unless subtype
    31	
    32	    "feed:#{type}:#{id}:#{subtype}"
    33	  end
    34	
    35	  # The number of items in the given timeline
    36	  # @param [Symbol] type
    37	  # @param [Integer] id
    38	  # @param [Symbol] subtype
    39	  # @return [Integer]
    40	  def timeline_size(type, id, subtype = nil)
    41	    redis.zcard(key(type, id, subtype))
    42	  end
    43	
    44	  # The filter result of the status to a particular feed
    45	  # @param [Symbol] timeline_type
    46	  # @param [Status] status
    47	  # @param [Account|List] receiver
    48	  # @return [void|Symbol] nil, :filter, or :skip_home
    49	  def filter(timeline_type, status, receiver)
    50	    case timeline_type
    51	    when :home
    52	      filter_from_home(status, receiver.id, build_crutches(receiver.id, [status]), :home)
    53	    when :list
    54	      (filter_from_list?(status, receiver) ? :filter : nil) || filter_from_home(status, receiver.account_id, build_crutches(receiver.account_id, [status], list: receiver), :list)
    55	    when :mentions
    56	      filter_from_mentions?(status, receiver.id) ? :filter : nil
    57	    when :tags
    58	      filter_from_tags?(status, receiver.id, build_crutches(receiver.id, [status])) ? :filter : nil
    59	    end
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  # Check if the status should not be added to a feed
    63	  # @param [Symbol] timeline_type
    64	  # @param [Status] status
    65	  # @param [Account|List] receiver
    66	  # @return [Boolean]
    67	  def filter?(timeline_type, status, receiver)
    68	    !!filter(timeline_type, status, receiver)
    69	  end
    70	
    71	  # Add a status to a home feed and send a streaming API update
    72	  # @param [Account] account
    73	  # @param [Status] status
    74	  # @param [Boolean] update
    75	  # @return [Boolean]
    76	  def push_to_home(account, status, update: false)
    77	    return false unless account.user&.signed_in_recently?
    78	    return false unless add_to_feed(:home, account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
    79	
    80	    trim(:home, account.id)
    81	    PushUpdateWorker.perform_async(account.id, status.id, "timeline:#{account.id}", { 'update' => update }) if push_update_required?("timeline:#{account.id}")
    82	    true
    83	  end
    84	
    85	  # Remove a status from a home feed and send a streaming API update
    86	  # @param [Account] account
    87	  # @param [Status] status
    88	  # @param [Boolean] update
    89	  # @return [Boolean]
    90	  def unpush_from_home(account, status, update: false)
    91	    return false unless remove_from_feed(:home, account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
    92	
    93	    redis.publish("timeline:#{account.id}", { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json) unless update
    94	    true
    95	  end
    96	
    97	  # Add a status to a list feed and send a streaming API update
    98	  # @param [List] list
    99	  # @param [Status] status
   100	  # @param [Boolean] update
   101	  # @return [Boolean]
   102	  def push_to_list(list, status, update: false)
   103	    return false if filter_from_list?(status, list)
   104	    return false unless list.account.user&.signed_in_recently?
   105	    return false unless add_to_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   106	
   107	    trim(:list, list.id)
   108	    PushUpdateWorker.perform_async(list.account_id, status.id, "timeline:list:#{list.id}", { 'update' => update }) if push_update_required?("timeline:list:#{list.id}")
   109	    true
   110	  end

   112	  # Remove a status from a list feed and send a streaming API update
   113	  # @param [List] list
   114	  # @param [Status] status
   115	  # @param [Boolean] update
   116	  # @return [Boolean]
   117	  def unpush_from_list(list, status, update: false)
   118	    return false unless remove_from_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   119	
   120	    redis.publish("timeline:list:#{list.id}", { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json) unless update
   121	    true
   122	  end

   124	  # Fill a home feed with an account's statuses
   125	  # @param [Account] from_account
   126	  # @param [Account] into_account
   127	  # @return [void]
   128	  def merge_into_home(from_account, into_account)
   129	    return unless into_account.user&.signed_in_recently?
   130	
   131	    timeline_key = key(:home, into_account.id)
   132	    aggregate    = into_account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?
   133	    query        = from_account.statuses.list_eligible_visibility.includes(reblog: :account).limit(FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4)
   134	
   135	    if redis.zcard(timeline_key) >= FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4
   136	      oldest_home_score = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, 0, with_scores: true).first.last.to_i
   137	      query = query.where('id > ?', oldest_home_score)
   138	    end
   139	
   140	    statuses = query.to_a
   141	    crutches = build_crutches(into_account.id, statuses)
   142	
   143	    statuses.each do |status|
   144	      next if filter_from_home(status, into_account.id, crutches)
   145	
   146	      add_to_feed(:home, into_account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: aggregate)
   147	    end
   148	
   149	    trim(:home, into_account.id)
   150	  end

   152	  # Fill a list feed with an account's statuses
   153	  # @param [Account] from_account
   154	  # @param [List] list
   155	  # @return [void]
   156	  def merge_into_list(from_account, list)
   157	    return unless list.account.user&.signed_in_recently?
   158	
   159	    timeline_key = key(:list, list.id)
   160	    aggregate    = list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?
   161	    query        = from_account.statuses.list_eligible_visibility.includes(reblog: :account).limit(FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4)
   162	
   163	    if redis.zcard(timeline_key) >= FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 4
   164	      oldest_home_score = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, 0, with_scores: true).first.last.to_i
   165	      query = query.where('id > ?', oldest_home_score)
   166	    end
   167	
   168	    statuses = query.to_a
   169	    crutches = build_crutches(list.account_id, statuses, list: list)
   170	
   171	    statuses.each do |status|
   172	      next if filter_from_home(status, list.account_id, crutches, :list)
   173	
   174	      add_to_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: aggregate)
   175	    end
   176	
   177	    trim(:list, list.id)

   180	  # Remove an account's statuses from a home feed
   181	  # @param [Account] from_account
   182	  # @param [Account] into_account
   183	  # @return [void]
   184	  def unmerge_from_home(from_account, into_account)
   185	    timeline_key        = key(:home, into_account.id)
   186	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   187	
   188	    from_account.statuses.select(:id, :reblog_of_id).where(id: timeline_status_ids).reorder(nil).find_each do |status|
   189	      remove_from_feed(:home, into_account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: into_account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   190	    end
   191	  end

   197	  def unmerge_from_list(from_account, list)
   198	    timeline_key        = key(:list, list.id)
   199	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   200	
   201	    from_account.statuses.select(:id, :reblog_of_id).where(id: timeline_status_ids).reorder(nil).find_each do |status|

   206	  # Remove a tag's statuses from a home feed
   207	  # @param [Tag] from_tag
   208	  # @param [Account] into_account
   209	  # @return [void]
   210	  def unmerge_tag_from_home(from_tag, into_account)
   211	    timeline_key        = key(:home, into_account.id)
   212	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   213	
   214	    # This is a bit tricky because we need posts tagged with this hashtag that are not
   215	    # also tagged with another followed hashtag or from a followed user
   216	    scope = from_tag.statuses
   217	      .where(id: timeline_status_ids)
   218	      .where.not(account: into_account)
   219	      .where.not(account: into_account.following)
   220	      .tagged_with_none(TagFollow.where(account: into_account).pluck(:tag_id))
   221	
   222	    scope.select(:id, :reblog_of_id).reorder(nil).find_each do |status|
   223	      remove_from_feed(:home, into_account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: into_account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?)
   224	    end
   225	  end

   227	  # Clear all statuses from or mentioning target_account from a home feed
   228	  # @param [Account] account
   229	  # @param [Account] target_account
   230	  # @return [void]
   231	  def clear_from_home(account, target_account)
   232	    timeline_key        = key(:home, account.id)
   233	    timeline_status_ids = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, -1)
   234	    statuses            = Status.where(id: timeline_status_ids).select(:id, :reblog_of_id, :account_id).to_a
   235	    reblogged_ids       = Status.where(id: statuses.filter_map(&:reblog_of_id), account: target_account).pluck(:id)
   236	    with_mentions_ids   = Mention.active.where(status_id: statuses.flat_map { |s| [s.id, s.reblog_of_id] }.compact, account: target_account).pluck(:status_id)
   237	
   238	    target_statuses = statuses.select do |status|
   239	      status.account_id == target_account.id || reblogged_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id)
   240	    end

240	    end
   241	
   242	    target_statuses.each do |status|
   243	      unpush_from_home(account, status)
   244	    end
   245	  end

   257	
   258	    target_statuses = statuses.select do |status|
   259	      status.account_id == target_account.id || reblogged_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.id) || with_mentions_ids.include?(status.reblog_of_id)
