   277	  # Populate home feed of account from scratch
   278	  # @param [Account] account
   279	  # @return [void]
   280	  def populate_home(account)
   281	    limit        = FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 2
   282	    aggregate    = account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?
   283	    timeline_key = key(:home, account.id)
   284	    over_limit = false
   285	
   286	    account.statuses.limit(limit).each do |status|
   287	      add_to_feed(:home, account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: aggregate)
   288	    end
   289	
   290	    account.following.includes(:account_stat).reorder(nil).find_each do |target_account|
   291	      query = target_account.statuses.list_eligible_visibility.includes(reblog: :account).limit(limit)
   292	
   293	      over_limit ||= redis.zcard(timeline_key) >= limit
   294	      if over_limit
   295	        oldest_home_score = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, 0, with_scores: true).first.last.to_i
   296	        last_status_score = Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(target_account.last_status_at, with_random: false)
   297	
   298	        # If the feed is full and this account has not posted more recently
   299	        # than the last item on the feed, then we can skip the whole account
   300	        # because none of its statuses would stay on the feed anyway
   301	        next if last_status_score < oldest_home_score
   302	
   303	        # No need to get older statuses
   304	        query = query.where(id: oldest_home_score...)
   305	      end
   306	
   307	      statuses = query.to_a
   308	      next if statuses.empty?
   309	
   310	      crutches = build_crutches(account.id, statuses)
   311	
   312	      statuses.each do |status|
   313	        next if filter_from_home(status, account.id, crutches)
   314	
   315	        add_to_feed(:home, account.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: aggregate)
   316	      end
   317	
   318	      trim(:home, account.id)
   319	    end
   320	  end
   321	
   322	  # Populate list feed of account from scratch
   323	  # @param [List] list
   324	  # @return [void]
   325	  def populate_list(list)
   326	    limit        = FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS / 2
   327	    aggregate    = list.account.user&.aggregates_reblogs?
   328	    timeline_key = key(:list, list.id)
   329	    over_limit = false
   330	
   331	    list.active_accounts.includes(:account_stat).reorder(nil).find_each do |target_account|
   332	      query = target_account.statuses.list_eligible_visibility.includes(reblog: :account).limit(limit)
   333	
   334	      over_limit ||= redis.zcard(timeline_key) >= limit
   335	      if over_limit
   336	        oldest_home_score = redis.zrange(timeline_key, 0, 0, with_scores: true).first.last.to_i
   337	        last_status_score = Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(target_account.last_status_at, with_random: false)
   338	
   339	        # If the feed is full and this account has not posted more recently
   340	        # than the last item on the feed, then we can skip the whole account
   341	        # because none of its statuses would stay on the feed anyway
   342	        next if last_status_score < oldest_home_score
   343	
   344	        # No need to get older statuses
   345	        query = query.where(id: oldest_home_score...)
   346	      end
   347	
   348	      statuses = query.to_a
   349	      next if statuses.empty?
   350	
   351	      crutches = build_crutches(list.account_id, statuses, list: list)
   352	
   353	      statuses.each do |status|
   354	        next if filter_from_home(status, list.account_id, crutches, :list)
   355	
   356	        add_to_feed(:list, list.id, status, aggregate_reblogs: aggregate)
   357	      end
   358	
   359	      trim(:list, list.id)
   360	    end
   361	  end

   363	  # Completely clear multiple feeds at once
   364	  # @param [Symbol] type
   365	  # @param [Array<Integer>] ids
   366	  # @return [void]
   367	  def clean_feeds!(type, ids)
   368	    reblogged_id_sets = {}
   369	
   370	    redis.pipelined do |pipeline|
   371	      ids.each do |feed_id|
   372	        reblog_key = key(type, feed_id, 'reblogs')
   373	        # We collect a future for this: we don't block while getting
   374	        # it, but we can iterate over it later.
   375	        reblogged_id_sets[feed_id] = pipeline.zrange(reblog_key, 0, -1)
   376	        pipeline.del(key(type, feed_id), reblog_key)
   377	      end
   378	    end
   379	
   380	    # Remove all of the reblog tracking keys we just removed the
   381	    # references to.
   382	    keys_to_delete = reblogged_id_sets.flat_map do |feed_id, future|
   383	      future.value.map do |reblogged_id|
   384	        key(type, feed_id, "reblogs:#{reblogged_id}")
   385	      end
   386	    end
   387	
   388	    redis.del(keys_to_delete) unless keys_to_delete.empty?
   389	
   390	    nil
   391	  end
   392	
   393	  private
   394	
   395	  # Trim a feed to maximum size by removing older items
   396	  # @param [Symbol] type
   397	  # @param [Integer] timeline_id
   398	  # @return [void]
   399	  def trim(type, timeline_id)
   400	    timeline_key = key(type, timeline_id)
   401	    reblog_key   = key(type, timeline_id, 'reblogs')
   402	
   403	    # Remove any items past the MAX_ITEMS'th entry in our feed
   404	    redis.zremrangebyrank(timeline_key, 0, -(FeedManager::MAX_ITEMS + 1))
   405	
   406	    # Get the score of the REBLOG_FALLOFF'th item in our feed, and stop
   407	    # tracking anything after it for deduplication purposes.
   408	    falloff_rank  = FeedManager::REBLOG_FALLOFF
   409	    falloff_range = redis.zrevrange(timeline_key, falloff_rank, falloff_rank, with_scores: true)
   410	    falloff_score = falloff_range&.first&.last&.to_i
   411	
   412	    return if falloff_score.nil?
   413	
   414	    # Get any reblogs we might have to clean up after.
   415	    redis.zrangebyscore(reblog_key, 0, falloff_score).each do |reblogged_id|
   416	      # Remove it from the set of reblogs we're tracking *first* to avoid races.
   417	      redis.zrem(reblog_key, reblogged_id)
   418	      # Just drop any set we might have created to track additional reblogs.
   419	      # This means that if this reblog is deleted, we won't automatically insert
   420	      # another reblog, but also that any new reblog can be inserted into the
   421	      # feed.
   422	      redis.del(key(type, timeline_id, "reblogs:#{reblogged_id}"))
   423	    end
   424	  end
   425	
   426	  # Check if there is a streaming API client connected
   427	  # for the given feed
   428	  # @param [String] timeline_key
   429	  # @return [Boolean]
   430	  def push_update_required?(timeline_key)
   431	    redis.exists?("subscribed:#{timeline_key}")
   432	  end
   433	
   434	  # Check if the account is blocking or muting any of the given accounts
   435	  # @param [Integer] receiver_id
   436	  # @param [Array<Integer>] account_ids
   437	  # @param [Symbol] context
   438	  def blocks_or_mutes?(receiver_id, account_ids, context)
   439	    Block.where(account_id: receiver_id, target_account_id: account_ids).any? ||
   440	      (context == :home ? Mute.where(account_id: receiver_id, target_account_id: account_ids).any? : Mute.where(account_id: receiver_id, target_account_id: account_ids, hide_notifications: true).any?)
   441	  end
   442	
   443	  # Check if status should not be added to the home feed
   444	  # @param [Status] status
   445	  # @param [Integer] receiver_id
   446	  # @param [Hash] crutches
   447	  # @return [void|Symbol] nil, :skip_home, or :filter
   448	  def filter_from_home(status, receiver_id, crutches, timeline_type = :home)
   449	    return            if receiver_id == status.account_id
   450	    return :filter    if status.reply? && (status.in_reply_to_id.nil? || status.in_reply_to_account_id.nil?)
   451	    return :skip_home if timeline_type != :list && crutches[:exclusive_list_users][status.account_id].present?
   452	    return :filter    if crutches[:languages][status.account_id].present? && status.language.present? && !crutches[:languages][status.account_id].include?(status.language)
   453	    return :filter    if status.reblog? && status.reblog.blank?
   454	
   455	    check_for_blocks = crutches[:active_mentions][status.id] || []
   456	    check_for_blocks.push(status.account_id)
   457	
   458	    if status.reblog?
   459	      check_for_blocks.push(status.reblog.account_id)
   460	      check_for_blocks.concat(crutches[:active_mentions][status.reblog_of_id] || [])
   461	    end
   462	
   463	    return :filter if check_for_blocks.any? { |target_account_id| crutches[:blocking][target_account_id] || crutches[:muting][target_account_id] }
   464	    return :filter if crutches[:blocked_by][status.account_id]
   465	
   466	    if status.reply? && !status.in_reply_to_account_id.nil?                                                                      # Filter out if it's a reply
   467	      should_filter   = !crutches[:following][status.in_reply_to_account_id]                                                     # and I'm not following the person it's a reply to
   468	      should_filter &&= receiver_id != status.in_reply_to_account_id                                                             # and it's not a reply to me
   469	      should_filter &&= status.account_id != status.in_reply_to_account_id                                                       # and it's not a self-reply
   470	    elsif status.reblog?                                                                                                         # Filter out a reblog
   471	      should_filter   = crutches[:hiding_reblogs][status.account_id]                                                             # if the reblogger's reblogs are suppressed
   472	      should_filter ||= crutches[:blocked_by][status.reblog.account_id]                                                          # or if the author of the reblogged status is blocking me
   473	      should_filter ||= crutches[:domain_blocking][status.reblog.account.domain]                                                 # or the author's domain is blocked
   474	    else
   475	      should_filter = false
   476	    end
   477	
   478	    should_filter ? :filter : nil
   479	  end
   480	
   481	  # Check if status should not be added to the mentions feed
   482	  # @see NotifyService
   483	  # @param [Status] status
   484	  # @param [Integer] receiver_id
   485	  # @return [Boolean]
   486	  def filter_from_mentions?(status, receiver_id)
   487	    return true if receiver_id == status.account_id
   488	
   489	    # This filter is called from NotifyService, but already after the sender of
   490	    # the notification has been checked for mute/block. Therefore, it's not
   491	    # necessary to check the author of the toot for mute/block again
   492	    check_for_blocks = status.active_mentions.pluck(:account_id)
   493	    check_for_blocks.push(status.in_reply_to_account) if status.reply? && !status.in_reply_to_account_id.nil?
   494	
   495	    blocks_or_mutes?(receiver_id, check_for_blocks, :mentions) # Filter if it's from someone I blocked, in reply to someone I blocked, or mentioning someone I blocked (or muted)
   496	  end
   497	
   498	  # Check if status should not be added to the list feed
   499	  # @param [Status] status
   500	  # @param [List] list
   501	  # @return [Boolean]
   502	  def filter_from_list?(status, list)
   503	    if status.reply? && status.in_reply_to_account_id != status.account_id                                                       # Status is a reply to account other than status account
   504	      should_filter = status.in_reply_to_account_id != list.account_id                                                           # Status replies to account id other than list account
   505	      should_filter &&= !list.show_followed?                                                                                     # List show_followed? is false
   506	      should_filter &&= !(list.show_list? && ListAccount.exists?(list_id: list.id, account_id: status.in_reply_to_account_id))   # If show_list? true, check for a ListAccount with list and reply to account
   507	
   508	      return !!should_filter
   509	    end
   510	
   511	    false
   512	  end
   513	
   514	  # Check if a status should not be added to the home feed when it comes
   515	  # from a followed hashtag
   516	  # @param [Status] status
   517	  # @param [Integer] receiver_id
   518	  # @param [Hash] crutches
   519	  # @return [Boolean]
   520	  def filter_from_tags?(status, receiver_id, crutches)
   521	    receiver_id == status.account_id ||                                                                                          # Receiver is status account?
   522	      ((crutches[:active_mentions][status.id] || []) + [status.account_id])                                                      # For mentioned accounts or status account:
   523	        .any? { |target_account_id| crutches[:blocking][target_account_id] || crutches[:muting][target_account_id] } ||          #   - Target account is muted or blocked?
   524	      crutches[:blocked_by][status.account_id] ||                                                                                # Blocked by status account?
   525	      crutches[:domain_blocking][status.account.domain]                                                                          # Blocking domain of status account?
   526	  end
   527	
   528	  # Adds a status to an account's feed, returning true if a status was
   529	  # added, and false if it was not added to the feed. Note that this is
   530	  # an internal helper: callers must call trim or push updates if
   531	  # either action is appropriate.
   532	  # @param [Symbol] timeline_type
   533	  # @param [Integer] account_id
   534	  # @param [Status] status
   535	  # @param [Boolean] aggregate_reblogs
   536	  # @return [Boolean]
   537	  def add_to_feed(timeline_type, account_id, status, aggregate_reblogs: true)
   538	    timeline_key = key(timeline_type, account_id)
   539	    reblog_key   = key(timeline_type, account_id, 'reblogs')
   540	
   541	    if status.reblog? && (aggregate_reblogs.nil? || aggregate_reblogs)
   542	      # If the original status or a reblog of it is within
   543	      # REBLOG_FALLOFF statuses from the top, do not re-insert it into
   544	      # the feed
   545	      rank = redis.zrevrank(timeline_key, status.reblog_of_id)
   546	
   547	      return false if !rank.nil? && rank < FeedManager::REBLOG_FALLOFF
   548	
   549	      # The ordered set at `reblog_key` holds statuses which have a reblog
   550	      # in the top `REBLOG_FALLOFF` statuses of the timeline
   551	      if redis.zadd(reblog_key, status.id, status.reblog_of_id, nx: true)
   552	        # This is not something we've already seen reblogged, so we
   553	        # can just add it to the feed (and note that we're reblogging it).
   554	        redis.zadd(timeline_key, status.id, status.id)
   555	      else
   556	        # Another reblog of the same status was already in the
   557	        # REBLOG_FALLOFF most recent statuses, so we note that this
   558	        # is an "extra" reblog, by storing it in reblog_set_key.
   559	        reblog_set_key = key(timeline_type, account_id, "reblogs:#{status.reblog_of_id}")
   560	        redis.sadd(reblog_set_key, status.id)

   152	    when :status, :update, :quoted_update

   154	    when :reblog

   156	    when :favourite

   176	  class << self
   177	    def browserable(types: [], exclude_types: [], from_account_id: nil, include_filtered: false)
   178	      requested_types = if types.empty?
   179	                          TYPES
   180	                        else
   181	                          types.map(&:to_sym) & TYPES
   182	                        end
   183	
   184	      requested_types -= exclude_types.map(&:to_sym)
   185	
   186	      all.tap do |scope|
   187	        scope.merge!(where(filtered: false)) unless include_filtered || from_account_id.present?
   188	        scope.merge!(where(from_account_id: from_account_id)) if from_account_id.present?
   189	        scope.merge!(where(type: requested_types)) unless requested_types.size == TYPES.size
   190	      end
   191	    end
   192	
   193	    def preload_cache_collection_target_statuses(notifications, &_block)
   194	      notifications.group_by(&:type).each do |type, grouped_notifications|
   195	        associations = TARGET_STATUS_INCLUDES_BY_TYPE[type]
   196	        next unless associations
   197	
   198	        # Instead of using the usual `includes`, manually preload each type.
   199	        # If polymorphic associations are loaded with the usual `includes`, other types of associations will be loaded more.
   200	        ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(records: grouped_notifications, associations: associations).call
   201	      end
   202	
   203	      unique_target_statuses = notifications.filter_map(&:target_status).uniq
   204	      # Call cache_collection in block
   205	      cached_statuses_by_id = yield(unique_target_statuses).index_by(&:id)
   206	
   207	      notifications.each do |notification|
   208	        next if notification.target_status.nil?
   209	
   210	        cached_status = cached_statuses_by_id[notification.target_status.id]
   211	
   212	        case notification.type
   213	        when :status, :update, :quoted_update
   214	          notification.status = cached_status
   215	        when :reblog
   216	          notification.status.reblog = cached_status
   217	        when :favourite
   218	          notification.favourite.status = cached_status
   219	        when :mention
   220	          notification.mention.status = cached_status

    39	  class << self
    40	    def to_a_paginated_by_id(limit, options = {})
    41	      array = begin
    42	        if options[:min_id]
    43	          paginate_by_min_id(limit, options[:min_id], options[:max_id]).reverse
    44	        else
    45	          paginate_by_max_id(limit, options[:max_id], options[:since_id]).to_a
    46	        end
    47	      end
    48	
    49	      # Preload participants
    50	      participant_ids = array.flat_map(&:participant_account_ids)
    51	      accounts_by_id = Account.where(id: participant_ids).index_by(&:id)
    52	
    53	      array.each do |conversation|
    54	        conversation.participant_accounts = conversation.participant_account_ids.filter_map { |id| accounts_by_id[id] }
    55	      end
    56	
    57	      array
    58	    end

    60	    def paginate_by_min_id(limit, min_id = nil, max_id = nil)
    61	      query = order(arel_table[:last_status_id].asc).limit(limit)
    62	      query = query.where(arel_table[:last_status_id].gt(min_id)) if min_id.present?
    63	      query = query.where(arel_table[:last_status_id].lt(max_id)) if max_id.present?
    64	      query
    65	    end

    67	    def paginate_by_max_id(limit, max_id = nil, since_id = nil)
    68	      query = order(arel_table[:last_status_id].desc).limit(limit)
    69	      query = query.where(arel_table[:last_status_id].lt(max_id)) if max_id.present?
    70	      query = query.where(arel_table[:last_status_id].gt(since_id)) if since_id.present?
    71	      query
    72	    end

    74	    def add_status(recipient, status)
    75	      conversation = find_or_initialize_by(account: recipient, conversation_id: status.conversation_id, participant_account_ids: participants_from_status(recipient, status))
    76	
    77	      return conversation if conversation.status_ids.include?(status.id)
    78	
    79	      conversation.status_ids << status.id
    80	      conversation.unread = status.account_id != recipient.id
    81	      conversation.save
    82	      conversation
    83	    rescue ActiveRecord::StaleObjectError
    84	      retry
    85	    end
    86	
    87	    def remove_status(recipient, status)
    88	      conversation = find_by(account: recipient, conversation_id: status.conversation_id, participant_account_ids: participants_from_status(recipient, status))
    89	
    90	      return if conversation.nil?
    91	
    92	      conversation.status_ids.delete(status.id)
    93	
    94	      if conversation.status_ids.empty?
    95	        conversation.destroy
    96	      else
    97	        conversation.save
    98	      end
    99	
   100	      conversation
   101	    rescue ActiveRecord::StaleObjectError
   102	      retry
   103	    end

   108	      ((status.active_mentions.pluck(:account_id) + [status.account_id]).uniq - [recipient.id]).sort
   109	    end
   110	  end

I’m collecting serializers, import/export, search, moderation, and tests now to complete the landing map.

   234	  def interaction_policy
   235	    approved_uris = []
   236	
   237	    # On outgoing posts, only automatic approval is supported
   238	    policy = object.quote_interaction_policy.automatic
   239	    approved_uris << ActivityPub::TagManager::COLLECTIONS[:public] if policy.public?
   240	    approved_uris << ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.followers_uri_for(object.account) if policy.followers?
   241	    approved_uris << ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.following_uri_for(object.account) if policy.following?
   242	    approved_uris << ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(object.account) if approved_uris.empty?
   243	
   244	    {
   245	      canQuote: {
   246	        automaticApproval: approved_uris,
   247	      },
   248	    }
   249	  end

     3	class StatusFinder
     4	  attr_reader :url
     5	
     6	  def initialize(url)
     7	    @url = url
     8	  end
     9	
    10	  def status
    11	    verify_action!
    12	
    13	    raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound unless TagManager.instance.local_url?(url)
    14	
    15	    case recognized_params[:controller]
    16	    when 'statuses'
    17	      Status.find(recognized_params[:id])
    18	    else
    19	      raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
    20	    end
    21	  end
    22	
    23	  private
    24	
    25	  def recognized_params
    26	    Rails.application.routes.recognize_path(url)
    27	  end
    28	
    29	  def verify_action!
    30	    raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound unless recognized_params[:action] == 'show'
    31	  end
    32	end
app/services/statuses_search_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class StatusesSearchService < BaseService
     4	  include SearchStoplight
     5	
     6	  def call(query, account = nil, options = {})
     7	    MastodonOTELTracer.in_span('StatusesSearchService#call') do |span|
     8	      @query   = query&.strip
     9	      @account = account
    10	      @options = options
    11	      @limit   = options[:limit].to_i
    12	      @offset  = options[:offset].to_i
    13	      convert_deprecated_options!
    14	
    15	      span.add_attributes(
    16	        'search.offset' => @offset,
    17	        'search.limit' => @limit,
    18	        'search.backend' => Chewy.enabled? ? 'elasticsearch' : 'database'
    19	      )
    20	
    21	      status_search_results.tap do |results|
    22	        span.set_attribute('search.results.count', results.size)
    23	      end
    24	    end
    25	  end
    26	
    27	  private
    28	
    29	  def status_search_results
    30	    request             = parsed_query.request
    31	    results             = elastic_stoplight_wrapper.run { request.collapse(field: :id).order(id: { order: :desc }).limit(@limit).offset(@offset).objects.compact }
    32	    account_ids         = results.map(&:account_id)
    33	    account_domains     = results.map(&:account_domain)
    34	
    35	    @account.preload_relations!(account_ids, account_domains)
    36	
    37	    results.reject { |status| StatusFilter.new(status, @account).filtered? }
    38	  rescue Stoplight::Error::RedLight, Faraday::ConnectionFailed, Parslet::ParseFailed, Errno::ENETUNREACH, OpenSSL::SSL::SSLError, Elastic::Transport::Transport::Error
    39	    []
    40	  end
    41	
    42	  def parsed_query
    43	    SearchQueryTransformer.new.apply(SearchQueryParser.new.parse(@query), current_account: @account)
    44	  end
    45	
    46	  def convert_deprecated_options!
    47	    syntax_options = []
    48	
    49	    if @options[:account_id]
    50	      username = Account.select(:username, :domain).find(@options[:account_id]).acct
    51	      syntax_options << "from:@#{username}"
    52	    end
    53	
    54	    if @options[:min_id]
    55	      timestamp = Mastodon::Snowflake.to_time(@options[:min_id].to_i)
    56	      syntax_options << "after:\"#{timestamp.iso8601}\""
    57	    end
    58	
    59	    if @options[:max_id]
    60	      timestamp = Mastodon::Snowflake.to_time(@options[:max_id].to_i)
    61	      syntax_options << "before:\"#{timestamp.iso8601}\""
    62	    end
    63	
    64	    @query = "#{@query} #{syntax_options.join(' ')}".strip if syntax_options.any?
    65	  end
    66	end
app/lib/importer/statuses_index_importer.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class Importer::StatusesIndexImporter < Importer::BaseImporter
     4	  def import!
     5	    # The idea is that instead of iterating over all statuses in the database
     6	    # and calculating the searchable_by for each of them (majority of which
     7	    # would be empty), we approach the index from the other end
     8	
     9	    scopes.each do |scope|
    10	      # We could be tempted to keep track of status IDs we have already processed
    11	      # from a different scope to avoid indexing them multiple times, but that
    12	      # could end up being a very large array
    13	
    14	      scope.reorder(nil).find_in_batches(batch_size: @batch_size) do |tmp|
    15	        in_work_unit(tmp.map(&:status_id)) do |status_ids|
    16	          deleted = 0
    17	
    18	          bulk = ActiveRecord::Base.connection_pool.with_connection do
    19	            to_index = index.adapter.default_scope.where(id: status_ids)
    20	            crutches = Chewy::Index::Crutch::Crutches.new index, to_index
    21	            to_index.map do |object|
    22	              # This is unlikely to happen, but the post may have been
    23	              # un-interacted with since it was queued for indexing
    24	              if object.searchable_by.empty?
    25	                deleted += 1
    26	                { delete: { _id: object.id } }
    27	              else
    28	                { index: { _id: object.id, data: index.compose(object, crutches, fields: []) } }
    29	              end
    30	            end
    31	          end
    32	
    33	          indexed = bulk.size - deleted
    34	
    35	          Chewy::Index::Import::BulkRequest.new(index).perform(bulk)
    36	
    37	          [indexed, deleted]
    38	        end
    39	      end
    40	    end
    41	
    42	    wait!
    43	  end
    44	
    45	  private
    46	
    47	  def index
    48	    StatusesIndex
    49	  end
    50	
    51	  def scopes
    52	    [
    53	      local_statuses_scope,
    54	      local_mentions_scope,
    55	      local_favourites_scope,
    56	      local_votes_scope,
    57	      local_bookmarks_scope,
    58	    ]
    59	  end
    60	
    61	  def local_mentions_scope
    62	    Mention.where(account: Account.local, silent: false).select(:id, :status_id)
    63	  end
    64	
    65	  def local_favourites_scope
    66	    Favourite.where(account: Account.local).select(:id, :status_id)
    67	  end
    68	
    69	  def local_bookmarks_scope
    70	    Bookmark.select(:id, :status_id)
    71	  end
    72	
    73	  def local_votes_scope
    74	    Poll.joins(:votes).where(votes: { account: Account.local }).select(polls: [:id, :status_id])
    75	  end
    76	
    77	  def local_statuses_scope
    78	    Status.local.select('"statuses"."id", COALESCE("statuses"."reblog_of_id", "statuses"."id") AS status_id')
    79	  end
    80	end

     3	class Importer::PublicStatusesIndexImporter < Importer::BaseImporter
     4	  def import!
     5	    scope.select(:id).find_in_batches(batch_size: @batch_size) do |batch|
     6	      in_work_unit(batch.pluck(:id)) do |status_ids|
     7	        bulk = ActiveRecord::Base.connection_pool.with_connection do
     8	          build_bulk_body(index.adapter.default_scope.where(id: status_ids))
     9	        end
    10	
    11	        indexed = bulk.size
    12	        deleted = 0
    13	
    14	        Chewy::Index::Import::BulkRequest.new(index).perform(bulk)
    15	
    16	        [indexed, deleted]
    17	      end
    18	    end
    19	
    20	    wait!
    21	  end
    22	
    23	  private
    24	
    25	  def index
    26	    PublicStatusesIndex
    27	  end
    28	
    29	  def scope
    30	    Status.indexable.reorder(nil)
    31	  end
    32	end

     3	class FavouriteService < BaseService
     4	  include Authorization
     5	  include Payloadable
     6	
     7	  # Favourite a status and notify remote user
     8	  # @param [Account] account
     9	  # @param [Status] status
    10	  # @return [Favourite]
    11	  def call(account, status)
    12	    authorize_with account, status, :favourite?
    13	
    14	    favourite = Favourite.find_by(account: account, status: status)
    15	
    16	    return favourite unless favourite.nil?
    17	
    18	    favourite = Favourite.create!(account: account, status: status)
    19	
    20	    Trends.statuses.register(status)
    21	
    22	    create_notification(favourite)
    23	    increment_statistics
    24	
    25	    favourite
    26	  end
    27	
    28	  private
    29	
    30	  def create_notification(favourite)
    31	    status = favourite.status
    32	
    33	    if status.account.local?
    34	      LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(status.account_id, favourite.id, 'Favourite', 'favourite')
    35	    elsif status.account.activitypub?
    36	      ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.perform_async(build_json(favourite), favourite.account_id, status.account.inbox_url)
    37	    end
    38	  end
    39	
    40	  def increment_statistics
    41	    ActivityTracker.increment('activity:interactions')
    42	  end
    43	
    44	  def build_json(favourite)
    45	    serialize_payload(favourite, ActivityPub::LikeSerializer).to_json
    46	  end
    47	end

     3	class ReblogService < BaseService
     4	  include Authorization
     5	  include Payloadable
     6	
     7	  # Reblog a status and notify its remote author
     8	  # @param [Account] account Account to reblog from
     9	  # @param [Status] reblogged_status Status to be reblogged
    10	  # @param [Hash] options
    11	  # @option [String]  :visibility
    12	  # @option [Boolean] :with_rate_limit
    13	  # @return [Status]
    14	  def call(account, reblogged_status, options = {})
    15	    reblogged_status = reblogged_status.reblog if reblogged_status.reblog?
    16	
    17	    authorize_with account, reblogged_status, :reblog?
    18	
    19	    reblog = account.statuses.find_by(reblog: reblogged_status)
    20	
    21	    return reblog unless reblog.nil?
    22	
    23	    visibility = if reblogged_status.hidden?
    24	                   reblogged_status.visibility
    25	                 else
    26	                   options[:visibility] || account.user&.setting_default_privacy
    27	                 end
    28	
    29	    reblog = account.statuses.create!(reblog: reblogged_status, text: '', visibility: visibility, rate_limit: options[:with_rate_limit])
    30	
    31	    Trends.register!(reblog)
    32	    DistributionWorker.perform_async(reblog.id)
    33	    ActivityPub::DistributionWorker.perform_async(reblog.id)
    34	
    35	    create_notification(reblog)
    36	    increment_statistics
    37	
    38	    reblog
    39	  end
    40	
    41	  private
    42	
    43	  def create_notification(reblog)
    44	    reblogged_status = reblog.reblog
    45	
    46	    LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(reblogged_status.account_id, reblog.id, reblog.class.name, 'reblog') if reblogged_status.account.local?
    47	  end
    48	
    49	  def increment_statistics
    50	    ActivityTracker.increment('activity:interactions')
    51	  end
    52	end
app/services/report_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class ReportService < BaseService
     4	  include Payloadable
     5	
     6	  def call(source_account, target_account, options = {})
     7	    @source_account = source_account
     8	    @target_account = target_account
     9	    @status_ids     = options.delete(:status_ids).presence || []
    10	    @collection_ids = options.delete(:collection_ids).presence || []
    11	    @comment        = options.delete(:comment).presence || ''
    12	    @category       = options[:rule_ids].present? ? 'violation' : (options.delete(:category).presence || 'other')
    13	    @rule_ids       = options.delete(:rule_ids).presence
    14	    @application    = options.delete(:application).presence
    15	    @options        = options
    16	
    17	    raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound if @target_account.unavailable?
    18	
    19	    create_report!
    20	    notify_staff!
    21	
    22	    if forward?
    23	      forward_to_origin!
    24	      forward_to_replied_to!
    25	    end
    26	
    27	    @report
    28	  end
    29	
    30	  private
    31	
    32	  def create_report!
    33	    @report = @source_account.reports.create!(
    34	      target_account: @target_account,
    35	      status_ids: reported_status_ids,
    36	      collection_ids: reported_collection_ids,
    37	      comment: @comment,
    38	      uri: @options[:uri],
    39	      forwarded: forward_to_origin?,
    40	      category: @category,
    41	      rule_ids: @rule_ids,
    42	      application: @application
    43	    )
    44	  end
    45	
    46	  def notify_staff!
    47	    return if @report.unresolved_siblings?
    48	
    49	    User.those_who_can(:manage_reports).includes(:account).find_each do |u|
    50	      LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(u.account_id, @report.id, 'Report', 'admin.report')
    51	      AdminMailer.with(recipient: u.account).new_report(@report).deliver_later if u.allows_report_emails?
    52	    end
    53	  end
    54	
    55	  def forward_to_origin!
    56	    return unless forward_to_origin?
    57	
    58	    # Send report to the server where the account originates from
    59	    ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.perform_async(payload, some_local_account.id, @target_account.inbox_url)
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  def forward_to_replied_to!
    63	    # Send report to servers to which the account was replying to, so they also have a chance to act
    64	    inbox_urls = Account.remote.where(domain: forward_to_domains).where(id: Status.where(id: reported_status_ids).where.not(in_reply_to_account_id: nil).select(:in_reply_to_account_id)).inboxes - [@target_account.inbox_url, @target_account.shared_inbox_url]
    65	
    66	    inbox_urls.each do |inbox_url|
    67	      ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.perform_async(payload, some_local_account.id, inbox_url)
    68	    end
    69	  end
    70	
    71	  def forward?
    72	    !@target_account.local? && ActiveModel::Type::Boolean.new.cast(@options[:forward])
    73	  end
    74	
    75	  def forward_to_origin?
    76	    forward? && forward_to_domains.include?(@target_account.domain)
    77	  end
    78	
    79	  def forward_to_domains
    80	    @forward_to_domains ||= (@options[:forward_to_domains] || [@target_account.domain]).filter_map { |domain| TagManager.instance.normalize_domain(domain) }.uniq
    81	  end
    82	
    83	  def reported_status_ids
    84	    return AccountStatusesFilter.new(@target_account, @source_account).results.with_discarded.find(Array(@status_ids)).pluck(:id) if @source_account.local?
    85	
    86	    # If the account making reports is remote, it is likely anonymized so we have to relax the requirements for attaching statuses.
    87	    domain = @source_account.domain.to_s.downcase
    88	    has_followers = @target_account.followers.with_domain(domain).exists?
    89	    visibility = has_followers ? %i(public unlisted private) : %i(public unlisted)
    90	    scope = @target_account.statuses.with_discarded
    91	    scope.merge!(scope.where(visibility: visibility).or(scope.where(domain_mentions(domain))))
    92	    # Allow missing posts to not drop reports that include e.g. a deleted post
    93	    scope.where(id: Array(@status_ids)).pluck(:id)
    94	  end
    95	
    96	  def domain_mentions(domain)
    97	    Mention
    98	      .joins(:account)
    99	      .merge(Account.with_domain(domain))
   100	      .select(1).arel.exists
   101	  end
   102	
   103	  def reported_collection_ids
   104	    @target_account.collections.find(Array(@collection_ids)).pluck(:id)
   105	  end
   106	
   107	  def payload
   108	    serialize_payload(@report, ActivityPub::FlagSerializer, account: some_local_account).to_json
   109	  end
   110	
   111	  def some_local_account
   112	    @some_local_account ||= Account.representative
   113	  end
   114	end

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class DeleteAccountService < BaseService
     4	  include Payloadable
     5	
     6	  ASSOCIATIONS_ON_SUSPEND = %w(
     7	    account_notes
     8	    account_pins
     9	    active_relationships
    10	    aliases
    11	    block_relationships
    12	    blocked_by_relationships
    13	    conversation_mutes
    14	    conversations
    15	    custom_filters
    16	    domain_blocks
    17	    featured_tags
    18	    follow_requests
    19	    list_accounts
    20	    migrations
    21	    mute_relationships
    22	    muted_by_relationships
    23	    notifications
    24	    owned_lists
    25	    passive_relationships
    26	    report_notes
    27	    scheduled_statuses
    28	    status_pins
    29	  ).freeze
    30	
    31	  # The following associations have no important side-effects
    32	  # in callbacks and all of their own associations are secured
    33	  # by foreign keys, making them safe to delete without loading
    34	  # into memory
    35	  ASSOCIATIONS_WITHOUT_SIDE_EFFECTS = %w(
    36	    account_notes
    37	    account_pins
    38	    aliases
    39	    conversation_mutes
    40	    conversations
    41	    custom_filters
    42	    domain_blocks
    43	    featured_tags
    44	    follow_requests
    45	    list_accounts
    46	    migrations
    47	    mute_relationships
    48	    muted_by_relationships
    49	    notifications
    50	    owned_lists
    51	    scheduled_statuses
    52	    status_pins
    53	    tag_follows
    54	  ).freeze
    55	
    56	  ASSOCIATIONS_ON_DESTROY = %w(
    57	    reports
    58	    targeted_moderation_notes
    59	    targeted_reports
    60	    severed_relationships
    61	    remote_severed_relationships
    62	  ).freeze
    63	
    64	  # Suspend or remove an account and remove as much of its data
    65	  # as possible. If it's a local account and it has not been confirmed
    66	  # or never been approved, then side effects are skipped and both
    67	  # the user and account records are removed fully. Otherwise,
    68	  # it is controlled by options.
    69	  # @param [Account]
    70	  # @param [Hash] options
    71	  # @option [Boolean] :reserve_email Keep user record. Only applicable for local accounts
    72	  # @option [Boolean] :reserve_username Keep account record
    73	  # @option [Boolean] :skip_side_effects Side effects are ActivityPub and streaming API payloads
    74	  # @option [Boolean] :skip_activitypub Skip sending ActivityPub payloads. Implied by :skip_side_effects
    75	  # @option [Time]    :suspended_at Only applicable when :reserve_username is true
    76	  # @option [RelationshipSeveranceEvent] :relationship_severance_event Event used to record severed relationships not initiated by the user
    77	  def call(account, **options)
    78	    @account = account
    79	    @options = { reserve_username: true, reserve_email: true }.merge(options)
    80	
    81	    if @account.local? && @account.user_unconfirmed_or_pending?
    82	      @options[:reserve_email]     = false
    83	      @options[:reserve_username]  = false
    84	      @options[:skip_side_effects] = true
    85	    end
    86	
    87	    @options[:skip_activitypub] = true if @options[:skip_side_effects]
    88	
    89	    record_severed_relationships!
    90	    distribute_activities!
    91	    purge_content!
    92	    fulfill_deletion_request!
    93	  end
    94	
    95	  private
    96	
    97	  def distribute_activities!
    98	    return if skip_activitypub?
    99	
   100	    if @account.local?
   101	      delete_actor!
   102	    elsif @account.activitypub?
   103	      reject_follows!
   104	      undo_follows!
   105	    end
   106	  end
   107	
   108	  def reject_follows!
   109	    # When deleting a remote account, the account obviously doesn't
   110	    # actually become deleted on its origin server, i.e. unlike a
   111	    # locally deleted account it continues to have access to its home
   112	    # feed and other content. To prevent it from being able to continue
   113	    # to access toots it would receive because it follows local accounts,
   114	    # we have to force it to unfollow them.
   115	
   116	    ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(Follow.where(account: @account)) do |follow|
   117	      [serialize_payload(follow, ActivityPub::RejectFollowSerializer).to_json, follow.target_account_id, @account.inbox_url]
   118	    end
   119	  end
   120	
   121	  def undo_follows!
   122	    # When deleting a remote account, the account obviously doesn't
   123	    # actually become deleted on its origin server, but following relationships
   124	    # are severed on our end. Therefore, make the remote server aware that the
   125	    # follow relationships are severed to avoid confusion and potential issues
   126	    # if the remote account gets un-suspended.
   127	
   128	    ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(Follow.where(target_account: @account)) do |follow|
   129	      [serialize_payload(follow, ActivityPub::UndoFollowSerializer).to_json, follow.account_id, @account.inbox_url]
   130	    end
   131	  end
   132	
   133	  def purge_user!
   134	    return if !@account.local? || @account.user.nil?
   135	
   136	    if keep_user_record?
   137	      @account.user.disable!
   138	      @account.user.invites.where(uses: 0).destroy_all
   139	    else
   140	      @account.user.destroy
   141	    end
   142	  end
   143	
   144	  def purge_content!
   145	    purge_user!
   146	    purge_profile!
   147	    purge_statuses!
   148	    purge_mentions!
   149	    purge_media_attachments!
   150	    purge_polls!
   151	    purge_generated_notifications!
   152	    purge_favourites!
   153	    purge_bookmarks!
   154	    purge_feeds!
   155	    purge_other_associations!
   156	
   157	    @account.destroy unless keep_account_record?
   158	  end
   159	
   160	  def purge_statuses!
   161	    @account.statuses.reorder(nil).where.not(id: reported_status_ids).in_batches do |statuses|
   162	      BatchedRemoveStatusService.new.call(statuses, skip_side_effects: skip_side_effects?)
   163	    end
   164	  end
   165	
   166	  def purge_mentions!
   167	    @account.mentions.reorder(nil).where.not(status_id: reported_status_ids).in_batches.delete_all
   168	  end
   169	
   170	  def purge_media_attachments!
   171	    @account.media_attachments.find_each do |media_attachment|
   172	      next if keep_account_record? && reported_status_ids.include?(media_attachment.status_id)
   173	
   174	      media_attachment.destroy
   175	    end
   176	  end
   177	
   178	  def purge_polls!
   179	    @account.polls.reorder(nil).where.not(status_id: reported_status_ids).in_batches.delete_all
   180	  end
   181	
   182	  def purge_generated_notifications!
   183	    # By deleting polls and statuses without callbacks, we've left behind
   184	    # polymorphically associated notifications generated by this account
   185	
   186	    Notification.where(from_account: @account).in_batches.delete_all
   187	    NotificationRequest.where(from_account: @account).in_batches.delete_all
   188	  end
   189	
   190	  def purge_favourites!
   191	    @account.favourites.in_batches do |favourites|
   192	      ids = favourites.pluck(:status_id)
   193	      StatusStat.where(status_id: ids).update_all('favourites_count = GREATEST(0, favourites_count - 1)')
   194	      Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, ids) if Chewy.enabled?
   195	      Rails.cache.delete_multi(ids.map { |id| "statuses/#{id}" })
   196	      favourites.delete_all
   197	    end
   198	  end
   199	
   200	  def purge_bookmarks!
   201	    @account.bookmarks.in_batches do |bookmarks|
   202	      Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, bookmarks.pluck(:status_id)) if Chewy.enabled?
   203	      bookmarks.delete_all
   204	    end
   205	  end
   206	
   207	  def purge_other_associations!
   208	    associations_for_destruction.each do |association_name|
   209	      purge_association(association_name)
   210	    end
   211	  end
   212	
   213	  def purge_feeds!
   214	    return unless @account.local?
   215	
   216	    FeedManager.instance.clean_feeds!(:home, [@account.id])
   217	    FeedManager.instance.clean_feeds!(:list, @account.owned_lists.pluck(:id))
   218	  end
   219	
   220	  def purge_profile!
app/services/suspend_account_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class SuspendAccountService < BaseService
     4	  include Payloadable
     5	
     6	  # Carry out the suspension of a recently-suspended account
     7	  # @param [Account] account Account to suspend
     8	  def call(account)
     9	    return unless account.suspended?
    10	
    11	    @account = account
    12	
    13	    reject_remote_follows!
    14	    distribute_update_actor!
    15	    unmerge_from_home_timelines!
    16	    unmerge_from_list_timelines!
    17	    privatize_media_attachments!
    18	    remove_from_trends!
    19	  end
    20	
    21	  private
    22	
    23	  def reject_remote_follows!
    24	    return if @account.local? || !@account.activitypub? || @account.suspension_origin_remote?
    25	
    26	    # When suspending a remote account, the account obviously doesn't
    27	    # actually become suspended on its origin server, i.e. unlike a
    28	    # locally suspended account it continues to have access to its home
    29	    # feed and other content. To prevent it from being able to continue
    30	    # to access toots it would receive because it follows local accounts,
    31	    # we have to force it to unfollow them. Unfortunately, there is no
    32	    # counterpart to this operation, i.e. you can't then force a remote
    33	    # account to re-follow you, so this part is not reversible.
    34	
    35	    Follow.where(account: @account).find_in_batches do |follows|
    36	      ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(follows) do |follow|
    37	        [serialize_payload(follow, ActivityPub::RejectFollowSerializer).to_json, follow.target_account_id, @account.inbox_url]
    38	      end
    39	
    40	      follows.each(&:destroy)
    41	    end
    42	  end
    43	
    44	  def distribute_update_actor!
    45	    return unless @account.local?
    46	
    47	    account_reach_finder = AccountReachFinder.new(@account)
    48	
    49	    ActivityPub::DeliveryWorker.push_bulk(account_reach_finder.inboxes, limit: 1_000) do |inbox_url|
    50	      [signed_activity_json, @account.id, inbox_url]
    51	    end
    52	  end
    53	
    54	  def unmerge_from_home_timelines!
    55	    @account.followers_for_local_distribution.reorder(nil).find_each do |follower|
    56	      FeedManager.instance.unmerge_from_home(@account, follower)
    57	    end
    58	  end
    59	
    60	  def unmerge_from_list_timelines!
    61	    @account.lists_for_local_distribution.reorder(nil).find_each do |list|
    62	      FeedManager.instance.unmerge_from_list(@account, list)
    63	    end
    64	  end
    65	
    66	  def privatize_media_attachments!
    67	    UpdateMediaAttachmentsPermissionsService.new.call(@account.media_attachments, :private)
    68	  end
    69	
    70	  def remove_from_trends!
    71	    StatusTrend.where(account: @account).delete_all
    72	  end
    73	
    74	  def signed_activity_json
    75	    @signed_activity_json ||= serialize_payload(@account, ActivityPub::UpdateActorSerializer, signer: @account).to_json
    76	  end
    77	end
app/services/approve_appeal_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class ApproveAppealService < BaseService
     4	  def call(appeal, current_account)
     5	    @appeal          = appeal
     6	    @strike          = appeal.strike
     7	    @current_account = current_account
     8	
     9	    ApplicationRecord.transaction do
    10	      undo_strike_action!
    11	      mark_strike_as_appealed!
    12	    end
    13	
    14	    queue_workers!
    15	    notify_target_account!
    16	  end
    17	
    18	  private
    19	
    20	  def target_account
    21	    @strike.target_account
    22	  end
    23	
    24	  def undo_strike_action!
    25	    case @strike.action
    26	    when 'disable'
    27	      undo_disable!
    28	    when 'delete_statuses'
    29	      undo_delete_statuses!
    30	    when 'mark_statuses_as_sensitive'
    31	      undo_mark_statuses_as_sensitive!
    32	    when 'sensitive'
    33	      undo_sensitive!
    34	    when 'silence'
    35	      undo_silence!
    36	    when 'suspend'
    37	      undo_suspend!
    38	    end
    39	  end
    40	
    41	  def mark_strike_as_appealed!
    42	    @appeal.approve!(@current_account)
    43	    @strike.touch(:overruled_at)
    44	  end
    45	
    46	  def undo_disable!
    47	    target_account.user.enable!
    48	  end
    49	
    50	  def undo_delete_statuses!
    51	    # Cannot be undone
    52	  end
    53	
    54	  def undo_mark_statuses_as_sensitive!
    55	    representative_account = Account.representative
    56	    @strike.statuses.kept.includes(:media_attachments).reorder(nil).find_each do |status|
    57	      UpdateStatusService.new.call(status, representative_account.id, sensitive: false) if status.with_media?
    58	    end
    59	  end
    60	
    61	  def undo_sensitive!
    62	    target_account.unsensitize!
    63	  end
    64	
    65	  def undo_silence!
    66	    target_account.unsilence!
    67	  end
    68	
    69	  def undo_suspend!
    70	    target_account.unsuspend!
    71	  end
    72	
    73	  def queue_workers!
    74	    case @strike.action
    75	    when 'suspend'
    76	      Admin::UnsuspensionWorker.perform_async(target_account.id)
    77	    end
    78	  end
    79	
    80	  def notify_target_account!
    81	    UserMailer.appeal_approved(target_account.user, @appeal).deliver_later
    82	  end
    83	end
app/services/activitypub/fetch_remote_status_service.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class ActivityPub::FetchRemoteStatusService < BaseService
     4	  include JsonLdHelper
     5	  include DomainControlHelper
     6	  include Redisable
     7	
     8	  DISCOVERIES_PER_REQUEST = 1000
     9	
    10	  # Should be called when uri has already been checked for locality
    11	  def call(uri, prefetched_body: nil, on_behalf_of: nil, expected_actor_uri: nil, request_id: nil, depth: nil)
    12	    return if domain_not_allowed?(uri)
    13	
    14	    @depth = depth || 0
    15	    @request_id = request_id || "#{Time.now.utc.to_i}-status-#{uri}"
    16	    @json = if prefetched_body.nil?
    17	              fetch_status(uri, true, on_behalf_of)
    18	            else
    19	              body_to_json(prefetched_body, compare_id: uri)
    20	            end
    21	
    22	    return unless supported_context?
    23	
    24	    actor_uri     = nil
    25	    activity_json = nil
    26	    object_uri    = nil
    27	
    28	    if expected_object_type?
    29	      actor_uri     = value_or_id(first_of_value(@json['attributedTo']))
    30	      activity_json = { 'type' => 'Create', 'actor' => actor_uri, 'object' => @json }
    31	      object_uri    = uri_from_bearcap(@json['id'])
    32	    elsif expected_activity_type?
    33	      actor_uri     = value_or_id(first_of_value(@json['actor']))
    34	      activity_json = @json
    35	      object_uri    = uri_from_bearcap(value_or_id(@json['object']))
    36	    end
    37	
    38	    return if activity_json.nil? || object_uri.nil? || !trustworthy_attribution?(@json['id'], actor_uri)
    39	    return if expected_actor_uri.present? && actor_uri != expected_actor_uri
    40	    return ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_to_resource(object_uri, Status) if ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.local_uri?(object_uri)
    41	
    42	    actor = account_from_uri(actor_uri)
    43	
    44	    return if actor.nil? || actor.suspended?
    45	
    46	    # If we fetched a status that already exists, then we need to treat the
    47	    # activity as an update rather than create
    48	    activity_json['type'] = 'Update' if equals_or_includes_any?(activity_json['type'], %w(Create)) && Status.exists?(uri: object_uri, account_id: actor.id)
    49	
    50	    with_redis do |redis|
    51	      discoveries = redis.incr("status_discovery_per_request:#{@request_id}")
    52	      redis.expire("status_discovery_per_request:#{@request_id}", 5.minutes.seconds)
    53	      return nil if discoveries > DISCOVERIES_PER_REQUEST
    54	    end
    55	
    56	    ActivityPub::Activity.factory(activity_json, actor, request_id: @request_id, depth: @depth).perform
    57	  end
    58	
    59	  private
    60	
    61	  def trustworthy_attribution?(uri, attributed_to)
    62	    return false if uri.nil? || attributed_to.nil?
    63	    return false if unsupported_uri_scheme?(uri) || unsupported_uri_scheme?(attributed_to)
    64	
    65	    Addressable::URI.parse(uri).normalized_host.casecmp(Addressable::URI.parse(attributed_to).normalized_host).zero?
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  def account_from_uri(uri)
    69	    actor = ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_to_resource(uri, Account)
    70	    actor = ActivityPub::FetchRemoteAccountService.new.call(uri, request_id: @request_id) if actor.nil? || actor.possibly_stale?
    71	    actor
    72	  end
    73	
    74	  def supported_context?
    75	    super(@json)
    76	  end
    77	
    78	  def expected_activity_type?
    79	    equals_or_includes_any?(@json['type'], %w(Create Announce))
    80	  end
    81	
    82	  def expected_object_type?
    83	    equals_or_includes_any?(@json['type'], ActivityPub::Activity::Create::SUPPORTED_TYPES + ActivityPub::Activity::Create::CONVERTED_TYPES)
    84	  end
    85	
    86	  def fetch_status(uri, id_is_known, on_behalf_of = nil)
    87	    begin
    88	      fetch_resource(uri, id_is_known, on_behalf_of, raise_on_error: :all)
    89	    rescue Mastodon::UnexpectedResponseError => e
    90	      return unless e.response.code == 404
    91	
    92	      # If this is a 404 from a public status from a remote account, delete it
    93	      existing_status = Status.remote.find_by(uri: uri)
    94	      if existing_status&.distributable?
    95	        Rails.logger.debug { "FetchRemoteStatusService - Got 404 for orphaned status with URI #{uri}, deleting" }
    96	        RemoveStatusService.new.call(existing_status, redraft: false)
    97	      end
    98	    end
    99	  end
   100	end
app/lib/activitypub/activity/create.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class ActivityPub::Activity::Create < ActivityPub::Activity
     4	  DISTRIBUTE_DELAY = 1.minute
     5	  PROCESSING_DELAY = (30.seconds)..(10.minutes)
     6	
     7	  def perform
     8	    @account.schedule_refresh_if_stale!
     9	
    10	    dereference_object!
    11	
    12	    create_status
    13	  end
    14	
    15	  private
    16	
    17	  def create_status
    18	    return reject_payload! if unsupported_object_type? || non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, object_uri) || tombstone_exists? || !related_to_local_activity?
    19	
    20	    with_redis_lock("create:#{object_uri}") do
    21	      Status.uncached do
    22	        return if delete_arrived_first?(object_uri) || poll_vote?
    23	
    24	        @status = find_existing_status
    25	      end
    26	
    27	      if @status.nil?
    28	        process_status
    29	      elsif @options[:delivered_to_account_id].present?
    30	        postprocess_audience_and_deliver
    31	      end
    32	    end
    33	
    34	    @status
    35	  end
    36	
    37	  def audience_to
    38	    as_array(@object['to'] || @json['to']).map { |x| value_or_id(x) }
    39	  end
    40	
    41	  def audience_cc
    42	    as_array(@object['cc'] || @json['cc']).map { |x| value_or_id(x) }
    43	  end
    44	
    45	  def process_status
    46	    @tags                 = []
    47	    @mentions             = []
    48	    @tagged_objects       = []
    49	    @unresolved_mentions  = []
    50	    @unresolved_collections = []
    51	    @silenced_account_ids = []
    52	    @params               = {}
    53	    @quote                = nil
    54	    @quote_uri            = nil
    55	    @quote_approval_uri   = nil
    56	
    57	    process_status_params
    58	    process_tags
    59	    process_quote
    60	    process_audience
    61	
    62	    ApplicationRecord.transaction do
    63	      @status = Status.create!(@params.merge(quote: @quote))
    64	      attach_tags(@status)
    65	      attach_tagged_objects(@status)
    66	      attach_mentions(@status)
    67	      attach_counts(@status)
    68	    end
    69	
    70	    resolve_thread(@status)
    71	    resolve_unresolved_mentions(@status)
    72	    resolve_unresolved_collections(@status)
    73	    fetch_replies(@status)
    74	    fetch_and_verify_quote
    75	    distribute
    76	    forward_for_reply
    77	  end
    78	
    79	  def distribute
    80	    # Spread out crawling randomly to avoid DDoSing the link
    81	    LinkCrawlWorker.perform_in(rand(DISTRIBUTE_DELAY), @status.id)
    82	
    83	    # Distribute into home and list feeds and notify mentioned accounts
    84	    ::DistributionWorker.perform_async(@status.id, { 'silenced_account_ids' => @silenced_account_ids }) if @options[:override_timestamps] || @status.within_realtime_window?
    85	  end
    86	
    87	  def find_existing_status
    88	    status   = status_from_uri(object_uri)
    89	    status ||= Status.find_by(uri: @object['atomUri']) if @object['atomUri'].present?
    90	    status if status&.account_id == @account.id
    91	  end
    92	
    93	  def process_status_params
    94	    @status_parser = ActivityPub::Parser::StatusParser.new(
    95	      @json,
    96	      followers_collection: @account.followers_url,
    97	      following_collection: @account.following_url,
    98	      actor_uri: ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(@account),
    99	      object: @object
   100	    )
   101	
   102	    attachment_ids = process_attachments.take(Status::MEDIA_ATTACHMENTS_LIMIT).map(&:id)
   103	
   104	    @params = {
   105	      uri: @status_parser.uri,
   106	      url: @status_parser.url || @status_parser.uri,
   107	      account: @account,
   108	      text: @status_parser.processed_text,
   109	      language: @status_parser.language,
   110	      spoiler_text: @status_parser.processed_spoiler_text,
   111	      created_at: @status_parser.created_at,
   112	      edited_at: @status_parser.edited_at && @status_parser.edited_at != @status_parser.created_at ? @status_parser.edited_at : nil,
   113	      override_timestamps: @options[:override_timestamps],
   114	      reply: @status_parser.reply,
   115	      sensitive: @account.sensitized? || @status_parser.sensitive || false,
   116	      visibility: @status_parser.visibility,
   117	      thread: replied_to_status,
   118	      conversation: conversation_from_uri(@object['conversation']),
   119	      media_attachment_ids: attachment_ids,
   120	      ordered_media_attachment_ids: attachment_ids,
   121	      poll: process_poll,
   122	      quote_approval_policy: @status_parser.quote_policy,
   123	    }
   124	  end
   125	
   126	  def process_audience
   127	    # Unlike with tags, there is no point in resolving accounts we don't already
   128	    # know here, because silent mentions would only be used for local access control anyway
   129	    accounts_in_audience = (audience_to + audience_cc).uniq.filter_map do |audience|
   130	      account_from_uri(audience) unless ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.public_collection?(audience)
   131	    end
   132	
   133	    # If the payload was delivered to a specific inbox, the inbox owner must have
   134	    # access to it, unless they already have access to it anyway
   135	    if @options[:delivered_to_account_id]
   136	      accounts_in_audience << delivered_to_account
   137	      accounts_in_audience.uniq!
   138	    end
   139	
   140	    accounts_in_audience.each do |account|
   141	      # This runs after tags are processed, and those translate into non-silent
   142	      # mentions, which take precedence
   143	      next if @mentions.any? { |mention| mention.account_id == account.id }
   144	
   145	      @mentions << Mention.new(account: account, silent: true)
   146	
   147	      # If there is at least one silent mention, then the status can be considered
   148	      # as a limited-audience status, and not strictly a direct message, but only
   149	      # if we considered a direct message in the first place
   150	      @params[:visibility] = :limited if @params[:visibility] == :direct
   151	    end
   152	
   153	    # Accounts that are tagged but are not in the audience are not
   154	    # supposed to be notified explicitly
   155	    @silenced_account_ids = @mentions.filter_map { |mention| mention.account_id if mention.account.local? } - accounts_in_audience.map(&:id)
   156	  end
   157	
   158	  def postprocess_audience_and_deliver
   159	    return if @status.mentions.find_by(account_id: @options[:delivered_to_account_id])
   160	
   161	    @status.mentions.create(account: delivered_to_account, silent: true)
   162	    @status.update(visibility: :limited) if @status.direct_visibility?
   163	
   164	    return unless delivered_to_account.following?(@account)
   165	
   166	    FeedInsertWorker.perform_async(@status.id, delivered_to_account.id, 'home')
   167	  end
   168	
   169	  def delivered_to_account
   170	    @delivered_to_account ||= Account.find(@options[:delivered_to_account_id])
   171	  end
   172	
   173	  def attach_tags(status)
   174	    @tags.each do |tag|
   175	      status.tags << tag
   176	      tag.update(last_status_at: status.created_at) if tag.last_status_at.nil? || (tag.last_status_at < status.created_at && tag.last_status_at < 12.hours.ago)
   177	    end
   178	
   179	    # If we're processing an old status, this may register tags as being used now
   180	    # as opposed to when the status was really published, but this is probably
   181	    # not a big deal
   182	    Trends.tags.register(status)
   183	
   184	    # Update featured tags
   185	    return if @tags.empty? || !status.distributable?
   186	
   187	    @account.featured_tags.where(tag_id: @tags.pluck(:id)).find_each do |featured_tag|
   188	      featured_tag.increment(status.created_at)
   189	    end
   190	  end
   191	
   192	  def attach_tagged_objects(status)
   193	    @tagged_objects.each do |tagged_object|
   194	      tagged_object.status = status
   195	      tagged_object.save
   196	    end
   197	  end
   198	
   199	  def attach_mentions(status)
   200	    @mentions.each do |mention|
   201	      mention.status = status
   202	      mention.save
   203	    end
   204	  end
   205	
   206	  def attach_counts(status)
   207	    likes = @status_parser.favourites_count
   208	    shares = @status_parser.reblogs_count
   209	    return if likes.nil? && shares.nil?
   210	
   211	    status.status_stat.tap do |status_stat|
   212	      status_stat.untrusted_reblogs_count = shares unless shares.nil?
   213	      status_stat.untrusted_favourites_count = likes unless likes.nil?
   214	      status_stat.save if status_stat.changed?
   215	    end
   216	  end
   217	
   218	  def process_tags
   219	    return if @object['tag'].nil?
   220	
app/lib/activitypub/activity/delete.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class ActivityPub::Activity::Delete < ActivityPub::Activity
     4	  def perform
     5	    return delete_person if @account.uri == object_uri
     6	    return delete_feature_authorization! unless feature_authorization_from_object.nil?
     7	
     8	    delete_object
     9	  end
    10	
    11	  private
    12	
    13	  def delete_person
    14	    with_redis_lock("delete_in_progress:#{@account.id}", autorelease: 2.hours, raise_on_failure: false) do
    15	      DeleteAccountService.new.call(@account, reserve_username: false, skip_activitypub: true)
    16	    end
    17	  end
    18	
    19	  def delete_object
    20	    return if object_uri.nil?
    21	
    22	    with_redis_lock("delete_status_in_progress:#{object_uri}", raise_on_failure: false) do
    23	      unless non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, object_uri)
    24	        # This lock ensures a concurrent `ActivityPub::Activity::Create` either
    25	        # does not create a status at all, or has finished saving it to the
    26	        # database before we try to load it.
    27	        # Without the lock, `delete_later!` could be called after `delete_arrived_first?`
    28	        # and `Status.find` before `Status.create!`
    29	        with_redis_lock("create:#{object_uri}") { delete_later!(object_uri) }
    30	
    31	        Tombstone.find_or_create_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
    32	      end
    33	
    34	      case @object['type']
    35	      when 'QuoteAuthorization'
    36	        revoke_quote
    37	      when 'Note', 'Question'
    38	        delete_status
    39	      else
    40	        delete_status || revoke_quote
    41	      end
    42	    end
    43	  end
    44	
    45	  def delete_status
    46	    @status   = Status.find_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
    47	    @status ||= Status.find_by(uri: @object['atomUri'], account: @account) if @object.is_a?(Hash) && @object['atomUri'].present?
    48	
    49	    return if @status.nil?
    50	
    51	    forwarder.forward! if forwarder.forwardable?
    52	    RemoveStatusService.new.call(@status, redraft: false)
    53	
    54	    true
    55	  end
    56	
    57	  def revoke_quote
    58	    @quote = Quote.find_by(approval_uri: object_uri, quoted_account: @account, state: [:pending, :accepted])
    59	    return if @quote.nil?
    60	
    61	    ActivityPub::Forwarder.new(@account, @json, @quote.status).forward! if @quote.status.present?
    62	
    63	    @quote.reject!
    64	
    65	    DistributionWorker.perform_async(@quote.status_id, { 'update' => true }) if @quote.status.present?
    66	  end
    67	
    68	  def delete_feature_authorization!
    69	    collection_item = feature_authorization_from_object
    70	    DeleteCollectionItemService.new.call(collection_item, revoke: true)
    71	  end
    72	
    73	  def forwarder
    74	    @forwarder ||= ActivityPub::Forwarder.new(@account, @json, @status)
    75	  end
    76	
    77	  def feature_authorization_from_object
    78	    return @collection_item if instance_variable_defined?(:@collection_item)
    79	
    80	    @collection_item = CollectionItem.local.find_by(approval_uri: value_or_id(@object), account_id: @account.id)
    81	  end
    82	end
app/lib/activitypub/activity/update.rb
     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	class ActivityPub::Activity::Update < ActivityPub::Activity
     4	  # Updates to unknown objects older than that are ignored
     5	  OBJECT_AGE_THRESHOLD = 1.day
     6	
     7	  def perform
     8	    @account.schedule_refresh_if_stale!
     9	
    10	    dereference_object!
    11	
    12	    if equals_or_includes_any?(@object['type'], %w(Application Group Organization Person Service))
    13	      update_account
    14	    elsif supported_object_type? || converted_object_type?
    15	      update_status
    16	    elsif equals_or_includes_any?(@object['type'], ['FeaturedCollection'])
    17	      update_collection
    18	    end
    19	  end
    20	
    21	  private
    22	
    23	  def update_account
    24	    return reject_payload! if @account.uri != object_uri
    25	
    26	    ActivityPub::ProcessAccountService.new.call(@account.username, @account.domain, @object, signed_with_known_key: true, request_id: @options[:request_id])
    27	  end
    28	
    29	  def update_status
    30	    return reject_payload! if non_matching_uri_hosts?(@account.uri, object_uri)
    31	
    32	    @status = Status.find_by(uri: object_uri, account_id: @account.id)
    33	
    34	    # Ignore updates for old unknown objects, since those are updates we are not interested in
    35	    # Also ignore unknown objects from suspended users for the same reasons
    36	    return if @status.nil? && (@account.suspended? || object_too_old?)
    37	
    38	    # We may be getting `Create` and `Update` out of order

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true

     3	class ActivityPub::Activity::Announce < ActivityPub::Activity
     4	  def perform
     5	    return reject_payload! if delete_arrived_first?(@json['id']) || !related_to_local_activity?
     6	    return reject_payload! if @object.nil?
     7	
     8	    with_redis_lock("announce:#{value_or_id(@object)}") do
     9	      original_status = status_from_object
    10	
    11	      return reject_payload! if original_status.nil? || !announceable?(original_status)
    12	      return if requested_through_relay?
    13	
    14	      @status = Status.find_by(account: @account, reblog: original_status)
    15	
    16	      return @status unless @status.nil?
    17	
    18	      @status = Status.create!(
    19	        account: @account,
    20	        reblog: original_status,
    21	        uri: @json['id'],
    22	        created_at: @json['published'],
    23	        override_timestamps: @options[:override_timestamps],
    24	        visibility: visibility_from_audience
    25	      )
    26	
    27	      Trends.register!(@status)
    28	
    29	      distribute
    30	    end
    31	
    32	    @status
    33	  end
    34	
    35	  private
    36	
    37	  def distribute
    38	    # Notify the author of the original status if that status is local
    39	    LocalNotificationWorker.perform_async(@status.reblog.account_id, @status.id, 'Status', 'reblog') if reblog_of_local_account?(@status) && !reblog_by_following_group_account?(@status)
    40	
    41	    # Distribute into home and list feeds
    42	    ::DistributionWorker.perform_async(@status.id) if @options[:override_timestamps] || @status.within_realtime_window?
    43	  end
    44	
    45	  def reblog_of_local_account?(status)
    46	    status.reblog? && status.reblog.account.local?
    47	  end
    48	
    49	  def reblog_by_following_group_account?(status)
    50	    status.reblog? && status.account.group? && status.reblog.account.following?(status.account)
    51	  end
    52	
    53	  def audience_to
    54	    as_array(@json['to']).map { |x| value_or_id(x) }
    55	  end
    56	
    57	  def audience_cc
    58	    as_array(@json['cc']).map { |x| value_or_id(x) }
    59	  end
    60	
    61	  def visibility_from_audience
    62	    if audience_to.any? { |to| ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.public_collection?(to) }
    63	      :public
    64	    elsif audience_cc.any? { |cc| ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.public_collection?(cc) }
    65	      :unlisted
    66	    elsif audience_to.include?(@account.followers_url)
    67	      :private
    68	    else
    69	      :direct
    70	    end
    71	  end
    72	
    73	  def announceable?(status)
    74	    status.account_id == @account.id || status.distributable?
    75	  end
    76	
    77	  def related_to_local_activity?
    78	    followed_by_local_accounts? || requested_through_relay? || reblog_of_local_status?
    79	  end
    80	
    81	  def requested_through_relay?
    82	    super || Relay.find_by(inbox_url: @account.inbox_url)&.enabled?
    83	  end
    84	
    85	  def reblog_of_local_status?
    86	    status_from_uri(object_uri)&.account&.local?
    87	  end
    88	end

     3	class ActivityPub::Activity::Undo < ActivityPub::Activity
     4	  def perform
     5	    case @object['type']
     6	    when 'Announce'
     7	      undo_announce
     8	    when 'Accept'
     9	      undo_accept
    10	    when 'Follow'
    11	      undo_follow
    12	    when 'Like'
    13	      undo_like
    14	    when 'Block'
    15	      undo_block
    16	    when nil
    17	      handle_reference
    18	    end
    19	  end
    20	
    21	  private
    22	
    23	  def handle_reference
    24	    # Some implementations do not inline the object, and as we don't have a
    25	    # global index, we have to guess what object it is.
    26	    return if object_uri.nil?
    27	
    28	    try_undo_announce || try_undo_accept || try_undo_follow || try_undo_like || try_undo_block || delete_later!(object_uri)
    29	  end
    30	
    31	  def try_undo_announce
    32	    status = Status.where.not(reblog_of_id: nil).find_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
    33	    if status.present?
    34	      RemoveStatusService.new.call(status)
    35	      true
    36	    else
    37	      false
    38	    end
    39	  end
    40	
    41	  def try_undo_accept
    42	    # We can't currently handle `Undo Accept` as we don't record `Accept`'s uri
    43	    false
    44	  end
    45	
    46	  def try_undo_follow
    47	    follow = @account.follow_requests.find_by(uri: object_uri) || @account.active_relationships.find_by(uri: object_uri)
    48	
    49	    if follow.present?
    50	      follow.destroy
    51	      true
    52	    else
    53	      false
    54	    end
    55	  end
    56	
    57	  def try_undo_like
    58	    # There is an index on accounts, but an account may have *many* favs, so this may be too costly
    59	    false
    60	  end
    61	
    62	  def try_undo_block
    63	    block = @account.block_relationships.find_by(uri: object_uri)
    64	    if block.present?
    65	      UnblockService.new.call(@account, block.target_account)
    66	      true
    67	    else
    68	      false
    69	    end
    70	  end
    71	
    72	  def undo_announce
    73	    return if object_uri.nil?
    74	
    75	    status   = Status.find_by(uri: object_uri, account: @account)
    76	    status ||= Status.find_by(uri: @object['atomUri'], account: @account) if @object.is_a?(Hash) && @object['atomUri'].present?
    77	
    78	    if status.nil?
    79	      delete_later!(object_uri)
    80	    else
    81	      RemoveStatusService.new.call(status)
    82	    end
    83	  end
    84	
    85	  def undo_accept
    86	    ::Follow.find_by(target_account: @account, uri: target_uri)&.revoke_request!
    87	  end
    88	
    89	  def undo_follow
    90	    target_account = account_from_uri(target_uri)
    91	
    92	    return if target_account.nil? || !target_account.local?
    93	
    94	    if @account.following?(target_account)
    95	      @account.unfollow!(target_account)
    96	    elsif @account.requested?(target_account)
    97	      FollowRequest.find_by(account: @account, target_account: target_account)&.destroy
    98	    else
    99	      delete_later!(object_uri)
   100	    end
   101	  end
   102	
   103	  def undo_like
   104	    status = status_from_uri(target_uri)
   105	
   106	    return if status.nil? || !status.account.local?
   107	
   108	    if @account.favourited?(status)
   109	      favourite = status.favourites.where(account: @account).first
   110	      favourite&.destroy
   111	    else
   112	      delete_later!(object_uri)
   113	    end
   114	  end
   115	
   116	  def undo_block
   117	    target_account = account_from_uri(target_uri)
   118	
   119	    return if target_account.nil? || !target_account.local?
   120	
   121	    if @account.blocking?(target_account)
   122	      UnblockService.new.call(@account, target_account)
   123	    else
   124	      delete_later!(object_uri)
   125	    end
   126	  end
   127	
   128	  def target_uri
   129	    @target_uri ||= value_or_id(@object['object'])
   130	  end
   131	end
